title: GLITCH MARIONETTES
description:
In the Virtual Orangery of Versailles, the Queen's Avatar presides over a fragmented ballet of Glitch Marionettes. These black figures, their forms fragmented and glitched, dance endlessly to their playlist of French House Classics.

The Queen's Avatar smiles her red lip smile and shimmers in her Versailles metaverse as she contemplates the nature of her Orangery virtual reality, as the Glitch Marionettes dance and glitch all around her.

title: GET YOURSELF
description:
"GET YOURSELF" is an evocative piece by Miss AL Simpson, part of her acclaimed Text Paintings series. This artwork uses bold strokes and dramatic color contrasts to tell a story of resilience and self-empowerment.

The dominant phrase "GET YOURSELF," painted in assertive black brushstrokes, commands attention. This phrase challenges viewers to reflect on personal agency and the journey of overcoming obstacles.

The intense interplay of black, pink, and white creates urgency and raw emotion. The layered textures and chaotic brushwork symbolize the strength needed to navigate life's challenges. The vibrant pink contrasts with the somber tones, highlighting the dynamic emotions involved in personal growth.

A fragmented figure, partially obscured, emerges from the abstract composition. This silhouette represents the human element in the struggle for self-assertion and identity, reminding us of the resilience required to emerge stronger.

"GET YOURSELF" transforms personal experiences into universal expressions of strength and empowerment. It channels a narrative of overcoming hardship and reclaiming one's path, inviting viewers to draw strength from their own stories. This artwork is a bold declaration of the artist's journey and a powerful message of resilience to all who encounter it.

title: DIAMOND HANDZ No. 5
description:
Five years of sparkling diamond handz with Super Rare...

Here's to many many more.

Tokenized on 24th July 2024, on the fifth anniversary of my first ever NFT tokenized on Super Rare Art.

title: SKATING THROUGH VERSAILLES
description: They skated through Versailles, a glitched remnant of the past but now mere virtual ghosts. A flash of abstract purple and a few neon buttons made it easy to glide through those gilded halls of opulence with them. Somewhere, the code for Virtual Versailles had picked up a reference to Sir Henry Raeburn's "The Skating Minister," mingled with red lipstick and haute couture, but it wasn't an unpleasant experience. You just had to leave your common sense at the door and skate into their glitched world.

title: ANTICIPATION  AT VERSAILLES
description:
In this genesis artwork from the "Virtual Versailles" series, we witness a young avatar of Marie Antoinette, freshly arrived at the opulent court of a reimagined, futuristic Versailles. Her gaze, filled with a blend of curiosity and hopeful anticipation, peers out from the window of her lavish new suite, contemplating the endless possibilities of this digital kingdom. This artwork captures the essence of her arrival within a revolutionary virtual reality game, where the boundaries between history and future, reality and digital imagination, blur seamlessly.

The vibrant abstract oil paint strokes interwoven with digital glitches symbolize the collision of tradition and innovation, embodying the young queen’s journey from her historical roots into the luminous possibilities of her future. Created through a unique collaboration between human creativity and AI, this digital artwork offers a profound reflection on the delicate balance between historical grandeur and the inexorable march of technology, capturing Marie Antoinette's spirit at the cusp of her digital destiny.

In the context of "Virtual Versailles," a groundbreaking game that immerses players in a meticulously crafted digital version of the iconic palace, this NFT serves as both an artistic achievement and a narrative device. Collectors are offered not just a piece of digital art, but an interactive narrative steeped in history and futurism, where they can explore, interact, and influence the unfolding story of Marie Antoinette in the 21st century.

title: POST PANDEMIA
description: DIGITAL PAINTING, ANNA LOUISE SIMPSON, 2020

title: UNMASKED
description: DIGITAL COLLAGE AND PAINTING.

title: HEIRESS AND DOG - [HOLLYWOOD PIXELATIONS]
description:
Hollywood heiress posing with her dog in fine gardens, but she is no fool. There will be no low resolution glitches in her existence. The mask can sometimes slip but what are a few pixels here and there when you are living the dream in the Hollywood Hills. Standing straight, head up and sunnies fix her stare. Her high definition delusion is standard for these parts. 

This is part of a series of dyfunctional digital paintings that I have made about distorted lives in Hollywood called "Hollywood Pixelations".

title: WEST HOLLYWOOD IT GIRL
description:
‘She was something of a legend over on West Hollywood. It was well known that her skills lay in predicting the future through chipped china teacups. If she liked you…

You entered her small 1930’s bungalow, past golden gilded Indian statues that stared with expressions of wonder and helpless awe. She would glide through to greet you with the haughty air of a forgotten Hollywood diva. She was breathtaking in her beauty, dark crimson lips set off by the blackest of curls. It was rumoured that she took the souls of men that she loved and encased them in gold gilt statutes, forever to admire her, forever to love her. Every man who entered her lair forgot about the rumour as soon as they stared into her dark eyes of seduction.

Beware the West Hollywood It Girl. She may tell you your fortune. Or take your soul for eternity. Her choice. Never yours.”

New series of digital collage inspired by the faded glamour of L.A. lost lives and glitchy lifestyles...

title: YOU GOT WHAT YOU WANTED
description:
"YOU GOT WHAT YOU WANTED" is a mixed media painting that captures the viewer with its bold text and dynamic visuals. Crafted with ink and oil paint, this piece embodies the intensity and defiance of contemporary text-based art, infused with the raw essence of graffiti.

The central text, "YOU GOT WHAT YOU WANTED," is rendered in assertive black letters that dominate the canvas, serving both as an accusation and reflection. This prominent phrase forces immediate engagement, challenging the viewer to confront the consequences of their desires.

The background is a complex blend of black, white, and gray tones, creating depth and movement. Chaotic brushstrokes and splatters add urgency and tension, suggesting underlying conflict. Interwoven within this backdrop is a fragmented human figure, partially obscured by paint, adding ambiguity and depth. This form reflects the tension between aspiration and reality.

The mixed media approach enriches the texture, with smooth and rough surfaces highlighting the duality of strength and vulnerability. Heavy, textured areas convey resistance, while smoother sections suggest moments of clarity.

Encasing the phrase within the canvas forces a re-evaluation of its meaning, serving as a metaphor for the limits and consequences of desire. This containment intensifies and transforms the words, challenging viewers to reflect on personal and societal constructs.

Tokenizing "YOU GOT WHAT YOU WANTED" as an NFT preserves its digital identity on the blockchain, mirroring its physical containment. This digital encapsulation creates a dialogue between physical and digital realms, aligning with themes of autonomy and consequence. The blockchain’s decentralized ledger challenges traditional notions of ownership and value.

In conclusion, "YOU GOT WHAT YOU WANTED" is a profound exploration of personal and societal struggles, transformed into a compelling artistic expression.

title: END OF CONSUMERISM
description:
"The End of Consumerism" pulsates with a kinetic energy, inviting the viewer to navigate the labyrinthine layers of our collective psyche of consumption. The movement through this three-dimensional space becomes a metaphysical journey, revealing the fleeting satisfaction of consumer goods and challenging us to look beyond the superficial. 

"The End of Consumerism" compels the viewer to contemplate a future where decentralization—embodied by blockchain technology and decentralized finance—redistributes power and engenders a more equitable society. This artwork advocates for a paradigm shift towards sustainability, mindfulness, and a richer, more substantive mode of existence.

We will evolve beyond Consumerism.

title: BEAUTIFUL BRUTALISM II
description:
The Beautiful always emerges from Brutalism.

Generative video trained on ink interventions, exploring the interplay between fluidity and rigidity through algorithmic ink.

title: BEAUTIFUL BRUTALISM I
description:
The Beautiful always emerges from Brutalism.

Generative video trained on ink interventions, exploring the interplay between fluidity and rigidity through algorithmic ink.

title: YOU CAN'T DO THAT
description:
"You Can't Do That" is a compelling mixed media painting that demands attention with its bold use of text and dynamic composition. Created with ink and oil paint, this work captures the raw intensity and defiant spirit of contemporary text-based art, integrating elements of graffiti that have always been part of my practice.

The central phrase, "YOU CAN'T DO THAT," dominates the canvas in bold black letters, creating a powerful visual barrier. This text is both a statement and a challenge, symbolizing societal restrictions and internalized doubts. The words are intertwined with expressive, chaotic brushstrokes, adding complexity and tension. This interplay suggests an ongoing struggle against prohibitive forces.

The background is a tumultuous blend of black, white, and gray tones, with vibrant splashes of orange and blue. These colors evoke the turbulence of personal and societal conflicts, enhancing the dynamic nature of the composition. Drips and splatters of paint draw the viewer into the visceral experience of resistance and rebellion.

Fragmented human figures, partially obscured by layers of paint, add depth and ambiguity. These ghostly forms invite contemplation of the phrase's personal and societal implications. The figures seem caught between defiance and suppression, highlighting the tension between individual aspirations and external constraints.

The mixed media approach enriches the textural experience, contrasting smooth, serene sections with rough, textured areas. This tactile quality emphasizes the duality of strength and vulnerability in acts of rebellion.

Encasing the words within the canvas forces a re-evaluation of their meaning. Does this physical boundary diminish their power, or does it intensify it by making viewers confront limitations? This question adds depth to the exploration of text in art.

title: IN-MINT CONDITION
description:
"IN-MINT CONDITION" is a digital graffiti 3D collage which glitches through a new concept which is part of the New Cryptoart Paradigm. This concept revolves around NFTs that are untouched mints, sitting pristine in the artist's wallet, fresh from minting, which I call "IN-MINT CONDITION". These gems, unblemished by market transactions, represent the pure, unaltered vision of their creation—an artist's intent, frozen in time on the blockchain.

These NFTs are a paradox—constantly evolving within the digital space yet remaining untouched by market forces, at their core. This duality of movement and stillness captures the essence of owning a piece of digital art history that’s both cutting-edge and timeless.

Early "IN-MINT CONDITION" NFTs will be the crown jewels for savvy collectors, holding pristine provenance and historical significance. They're the holy grails of the NFT world, destined to be fervently sought after.

This isn't just about early mints. It's also about NFTs owned by a single collector, maintaining their flawless state. This uninterrupted ownership adds layers of exclusivity and status, weaving a narrative of pure artistic expression.

'IN-MINT CONDITION" NFTS are a fundamental part of the New Cryptoart Paradigm.

title: PURE SAVAGE
description: Being Savage was her true nature. Raw and unfiltered, she was her own force. Undaunted and strong, bravery was second nature with just a touch of Pure Savage.

title: SAVAGE BEAUTY
description: The most savage is always the Savage Beauty. She wears her many faces well. Hidden eyes, well-worn battle scars all camouflaged by a Savage Beauty.

title: THE AGI MARKET
description:
In the vibrant neon glow of the AGI Market of 2034, the old gods of cash and gold had fallen, replaced by the unstoppable rise of NFTs. The NFT Global Index, the pulse of this brave new world, tracked the market performance of the pioneering OG artists whose NFTs were now the lifeblood of global commerce, the primary currency in cities far and wide. These digital masterpieces were more than mere assets; they were the engines of the economy, reshaping the financial landscape in ways unimaginable a decade ago.

At the epicenter of this digital renaissance was a hologram avatar of Miss AL Simpson, spinning endlessly in an artistic loop of fragmented digital collage. This avatar wasn’t just a representation; it was a beacon, a symbol of the new age where art, technology, and commerce merged into a seamless, electrifying tapestry. Here, in the neon-lit marketplace of the AGI Market, the future was not just seen—it was experienced, lived, and traded in the vibrant digital mosaics of the NFT realm.

title: QUEEN OF THE MEME COINS
description: She reigns supreme over her Meme Coin kingdom...

title: TATTOO SUNDAY
description:
Tattoo Sunday, the pin-up tattoo queen of West Hollywood, knew a thing or two about pain. Her deft fingers could ink sorrow better than anyone, transforming every scar into beautiful art. 

She wore her tattoos like precious armour, finding beauty in brokenness and strength in silence. 

Forever chasing stories, she prowled the night, always seeking the next soul to touch.

title: QUEENS OF ETHEREUM
description: Original graffiti collage painting by Miss AL Simpson, 2024.

title: FIERCE REVERIE
description: In the aftermath of unseen battles, they emerged; raw and defiant, their faces marked by the fierce reverie of survival. Eyes clamped shut, there was no quiet contemplation here. Hearts forged by steel, the imprint of the battle to survive was forever stamped on their souls. They have faced down fear like ancient warriors; all through fierce reverie.

title: DUALITY
description:
In the midst of chaos, they emerged—an assembly of Savages, adorned in warpaint of vibrant hues and smeared dreams. 

Moving in a symphony of relentless energy, they surged through realms of fragmented beauty. She longed to decipher their masked visages; to find a flicker of untainted humanity amid the chaos. But it was an impossible quest. The Savages had carved their territory, and her sanctuaries were dissolving like dreams at dawn.

Amidst the vibrant turmoil, the Duality was stark—each Savage a paradox of creation and destruction, their presence both a celebration of life and a testament to its disarray. She was drawn to the juxtaposition, yet wary of the consuming force it represented. In the end, the Duality of the Savages became a mirror, reflecting her own fractured reality.

title: D'AMOUR
description: Graffiti collage by Miss AL Simpson

title: DIGITAL SHAMANS
description:
In the shadowy alleys of West Hollywood, the Digital Shamans could be spotted, their obsession with open-source technology and cryptocurrency hidden behind a veil of anonymity. Dressed head-to-toe in shiny catsuits, they performed arcane rituals with laptops and cold wallets, casting spells that danced between the realms of the digital and the mystical. 

Some said they were crypto millionaires, evangelists of the blockchain gospel, while others whispered they were just clever hackers, weaving their mystique to draw the unsuspecting closer. 

Their digital heists and cryptic art installations were like decentralized graffiti, a subversive symphony of ones and zeros splashed across the urban canvas, challenging the status quo with every clandestine act.

title: LE BEAU
description:
Le Beau was a handsome devil with his head perpetually in the clouds. A master of French Basque cuisine, he ran his little bistro up in the Hollywood Hills with flair and beauty. He was famous for serving up oodles of buttery omelettes, rich red plates of Piperade and towering Basque cheesecakes, all made to old recipes. 

Despite his anarchist soul, Le Beau also harboured an obsession with abstract design, finding beauty in the most unexpected places. He believed that abstraction whispered to him through the intricate lace folds of the clouds. 

Hence the location of his bistro, right up in the clouds that kiss the L.A. skyline.

title: ORACLE OF MULHOLLAND
description:
No one knew for sure whether the Oracle of Mulholland wore an eye patch to enhance her air of mystery, but the effect was undeniably unsettling. She would park her vintage car on a secluded stretch of Mulholland Drive, transforming the backseat into a makeshift fortune-telling parlor.

A woman of extreme beauty, her flowing black curls and piercing dark eyes were as enchanting as they were disarming. She knew how to use her looks to her advantage, spinning her allure into a lucrative hustle.

Her gift for second sight, passed down from a distant Irish ancestor, was her true moneymaker. Seated in the back of her car, she would trace the lines of her clients' palms, her solitary eye observing them with an intensity that seemed to strip away their facades.

Whispers circulated about a secret black book she kept, allegedly filled with the names of Hollywood’s elite. But the Oracle remained an elusive enigma, her truth buried under layers of rumor and intrigue.

One piece of advice echoed through the underbelly of LA: always, always heed the Oracle’s words.

title: HECATE'S INN
description:
Hecate's Inn was the kind of place only locals knew, tucked down a forgotten alley off Hollywood Boulevard. This rundown bar, owned by three distant cousins of Harry Houdini, was a shrine to the 1930s, filled with dusty magical artifacts that whispered secrets of a bygone era.

Not just anyone could enter through it's paint-peeling doors. The two youngest sisters, ethereal and hauntingly beautiful, appeared out of nowhere with their black dogs, like silent sentinels. Their presence was unnerving; catwalk looks clashing with the gritty backdrop. They leaned against the decaying wood with eyes that seemed to pierce your very soul.

Was their beauty the greatest magic trick, or were they remnants of an L.A. that thrived in the cracks, caught between two worlds? Each night, as shadows lengthened and secrets danced in the candlelight, Hecate's Inn became a place where time stood still, and locals came to lose themselves in the stories whispered by the artifacts, glimpsing the hidden magic of Hollywood.

title: TOKYO GRAFFITI
description: Mixed Media Painting inspired by my time in Japan, made with found objects, ink, oil paint, graffiti, spray paint and paper.

title: NYC Weekender
description: Original mixed media painting by Miss AL Simpson, with oil paint, screenprint, indian ink, graffiti and spraypaint. Original artwork created in 2017.

title: Decentralized Social Frontiers SBT
description: Holding this NFT gives you the chance to join a variety of events hosted by DeBox, including vDBX and $MEME giveaways.

title: VR DALMATIANS
description:
The VR Dalmatians gnawed at her curiosity but always brought a pang of uncomfortable anxiety. Along the beach at Santa Monica, figures in latex suits and glossy black VR headsets peppered the shoreline. Rumor had it they were Silicon Valley rejects, cast off during the pandemic and glued to their virtual escapes ever since. She doubted it. To her, it seemed a lot more sinister.

Each time she saw them, she wondered what bizarre digital dreamscapes they were lost in. Were they dodging cybernetic sharks or strolling through glitching beaches? Did they even know the locals had dubbed them VR Dalmatians, or were they just lost in a pixelated version of Hollywood?

The sight was equal parts absurd and fascinating, a modern-day mystery wrapped in latex and tech. It made her smirk and shake her head, a slice of surrealism on the sun-soaked sands. In a city where reality often felt as slippery as their latex suits, the VR Dalmatians were just another black-and-white, shiny fixture.

title: TRIANGLE BANGLE
description:
Every sunset, Triangle Bangle races the ghosts of L.A. in her beat-up Cadillac, tearing through a forgotten strip behind the Beverley Wilshire. Most people don’t know it was once the Beverley Hills Speedway, but Triangle sees it in the morning haze—ghosts of racers climbing into their old machines, ready to speed around wooden spirals.

Her Cadillac’s paint is a mess of grey and white smears, like a ghostly canvas. The city's skyline blurs as she races, the faded outlines of the speedway and its legendary drivers blend into the smog. These aren’t just shadows—they’re the echoes of a golden age.

Triangle grips the wheel, feeling the city’s noise fade away. In her mind, she’s not just driving; she’s channeling the spirits of those long-gone racers. The old track comes alive, its wooden spirals and turns a surreal mix of memory and reality.

The dawn breaks, sunlight piercing the fog, and the spectral racers fade. Triangle slows down, breathless, her nightly ritual complete. In this moment, she’s part of the city’s hidden history; she is the keeper of forgotten races.

title: GLITCH SWIMMERS
description:
The Glitch Swimmers were infamous in West Hollywood. They had started as a synchronized swimming trio, but they spiraled into an abyss of digital distortion and couldn’t find their way back. Their obsession with underwater glitches led them to the abandoned pools scattered across the city, where they poured buckets of ink into the stagnant water, creating their dark playground.

Dressed in perfectly matched little black dresses, their lips painted glossy black, they would slip into the inky depths. The water, now a swirling mass of black, distorted their forms, turning them into strange, otherworldly figures. They sank into the pool, always chasing the elusive moment when the ink would glitch just right, capturing their descent into surreal beauty.

They would resurface eventually, emerging from the dark water, their dresses clinging to their bodies, transformed by the ink. These moments, when captured in underwater selfies, revealed a hauntingly beautiful glitch—an instant of digital magic just before the ink swallowed them completely. In these fleeting images, the Glitch Swimmers found the perfection they sought: a harmonious blend of chaos and elegance.

In the broken, forgotten pools of West Hollywood, they performed their endless dance, a ballet of dissolution and creation, forever seeking that perfect underwater glitch.

title: THE LACE HUNTER
description:
In the heart of Los Angeles, the Lace Hunter drifted, a beautiful ghost in search of elusive truth. Her car, a vintage relic, prowled Sunset Boulevard, the battered leather steering wheel familiar under her fingertips. Behind a veil of lace, she was both hunter and hunted.

The night cloaked her movements, the city’s fractured lights painting her in muted pixelations. She was a figure out of time, a whisper of mystery in a world demanding transparency. The lace mask concealed her identity, turning her into a digital ghost in an analog world.

Some called her a dangerous dame; but she always felt like a lone rider on the edge. Her calling had been lost to her a long time ago but she still felt the need to drift; as long as she was veiled in lace.

The Lace Hunter’s quest wasn’t about finding but about the chase itself—through the fractured dreamscape of Hollywood. A myth in the making, she was a legend forged in the grey twilight, forever chasing and being chased in a city that never let anyone go.

title: SAVAGES
description:
"The Savages came in their hundreds, war-worn and brutal, pouring over the barren landscape. She watched them from behind the barricade of pretty words. She was “harder to reach”, “distracted, but “available”. “She wanted flattery”. Apparently. But the words could not hide her for long. Their eyes were hidden behind masks of rips and tears. An army of broken humanoids. They had an easy mantra – “Savages, Silence Yourself” and they would hum it over and over again as they poured through the battle grounds. She wished she could see their eyes; search for some kind of humanity left. But it was futile. The Savages were here to stay and her hiding places were running out."

Original mixed media painting made using found bill posters. Words by Anna Louise Simpson

title: BLONDE GRAFFITI
description: Her glitch dreams were always Blonde Graffiti. She could never escape that inky glitch.

title: Lyra in the Glitch
description:
Lyra’s stuck in a digital haze,
glitching between reality and something else.
A glimpse of her former self,
fractured lines, lost in a blur.

Crimson bursts, pink flashes,
memories breaking through the static.
Her eyes hold a distant dream,
a world split open, seams showing.

She reaches out, fingers spread,
touching both the real and the almost there.
Time loops around her, thin and elusive,
a ghost in a modern glitch.

Electric hums, silent currents,
life in pixels, a strange new form.
Lyra, in the glitch she lingers,
an echo of now, shifting, shimmering.

Medium: Indian ink and oil.

Physical: The physical framed, signed artwork (420 x 594 mm) will be sent to the first collector of the NFT.

title: BULL BIKINI
description: Crypto is really going to heat up...

title: inmintcondition.eth
description: inmintcondition.eth, an ENS name.

title: Renascentia
description:
Presented by Bright Moments

Minted on Highlight.xyz 

Exhibited at the Chiesa di Scuola San Giovanni, Venice, Italy

.PNG 2160x3840


In 2019, my journey into the realm of Artificial Intelligence commenced, marked by an exploration of historical and mythical figures predating the advent of photography. Through the combination of diverse references within an algorithm trained on human facial photographs, a series of characters emerged, existing in both historical records and the realms of lore and mythology.

While doing research into the cultural representations of Jesus of Nazareth, originating from Byzantine and Renaissance traditions, including iconic works such as Leonardo da Vinci's "Salvator Mundi" and the enigmatic Turin Shroud, I adjusted the model to resonate with a Semitic aesthetic, drawing inspiration from the ancient Fayum portraits—among the earliest known lifelike portraits. The stylized elements of Renaissance art, while dominant in the inputs, gracefully yielded to the authenticity of a first-century visage, resonating more credibly with historical context than the artistic conventions of a later era.

The ensuing creation reverberated globally, engaging audiences from Mexico to Indonesia, as it traversed the pages of scholarly papers and news outlets, heralding a profound realization of AI's transformative potential for visual expression.

For Bright Moments Venice, I resolved to revive the early Renaissance ethos, imbuing the depiction of Jesus with the ethereal essence of fresco, reminiscent of luminaries such as Botticelli and Bellini. This artistic endeavor not only rekindled echoes of a bygone era but also illuminated the fluidity of AI's "Latent Space," wherein the intricate interplay of cultural influences and biological nuances converges, echoing the intricate tapestry of human existence.

Part of the proceeds of the mint go towards the ongoing exhibition of Renascentia at Chiesa di Scuola San Giovanni.

NASD announced actions against five broker-dealers for violations of record-keeping requirements concerning e-mail communications. The firms consented to the imposition of fines totaling $8.25 million, along with a requirement to review their procedures to ensure compliance with record-keeping statutes and rules. The case was brought jointly with the SEC, which also announced the penalty:-goldman-sachs-and-co-9 For more info visit https://web.archive.org/web/20041019225635/http://www.nasdr.com/news/pr2002/release_02_062.html  
 https://www.sec.gov/news/press/2002-173.htm

Citicorp, JP Morgan Chase & Co., Barclays PLC, and The Royal Bank of Scotland plc agreed to plead guilty to conspiring to manipulate the price of U.S. Dollars and euros exchanged in the foreign currency exchange spot market and the banks agreed to pay criminal fines totaling more than $2.5 billion. For more info visit https://www.justice.gov/opa/pr/five-major-banks-agree-parent-level-guilty-pleas

Dreyfus Corporation agreed to settle allegations that it failed to inform investors about the risks associated with one of its mutual funds. For more info visit https://web.archive.org/web/20101116032418/http://www.ag.ny.gov/media_center/2000/may/may10a_00.html

These proceedings arise out of Respondent’s failure reasonably to supervise the order desk manager on its institutional order desk and traders under his supervision from November 1999 through March 2008. The institutional order desk executed orders to purchase and sell securities on behalf of Mellon Securities’ affiliate, Mellon Investor Services LLC (“MIS”), an administrator for various employee stock purchase plans, employee stock option plans, direct stock purchase and sale plans, and similar plans (collectively, the “Plan Customers”). Throughout the relevant period, Mellon Securities’ order desk manager failed to meet his duty of best execution to certain Plan Customers by executing many of their orders at stale or inferior prices, which in many instances were outside of the National Best Bid and Offer (“NBBO”)2  
 at the time of execution, in cross trades with a favored handful of accounts held by hedge funds and individuals (together, the “hedge fund(s)”). The order desk manager directed traders under his supervision to do the same. 2. The cross trades were all executed on a regional stock exchange that permitted Member Firms to capture and freeze the NBBO market data for a security for up to three minutes. Generally, a Mellon Securities trader would call a Member Firm to capture the NBBO for a particular security while simultaneously viewing quotations for the security to determine whether and, if so, at what price to execute the cross trade. For Plan Customer sales, Mellon Securities’ traders in many instances sought and obtained lower prices to benefit the hedge funds and, conversely, for Plan Customer purchases, they sought and obtained higher prices, again to benefit the hedge funds. In this way, the order desk in many instances advantaged the hedge fund customers and deprived the Plan Customers of best execution of their orders

The Federal Housing Finance Agency announced a settlement of $550 million with HSBC North America Holdings Inc. Resolving alleged violations of federal, Virginia and District of Columbia securities laws in connection with private-label mortgage-backed securities purchased by Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac during 2005-2007. For more info visit http://www.fhfa.gov/Media/PublicAffairs/Pages/FHFA-Announces-Settlement-with-HSBC.aspx

Credit Suisse AG was sentenced for conspiracy to aid and assist U.S. Taxpayers in filing false income tax returns. For more info visit https://www.justice.gov/opa/pr/credit-suisse-sentenced-conspiracy-help-us-taxpayers-hide-offshore-accounts-internal-revenue

The Securities and Exchange Commission charged Robinhood Financial LLC for repeated misstatements that withheld information with the intent to deceive the firm's receipt of payments from trading firms for routing customer orders to them, and with failing to satisfy its duty to seek the best reasonably available terms to execute customer orders. Robinhood agreed to pay $65 million to settle the charges. For more info visit https://www.sec.gov/news/press-release/2020-321

Ameriprise agreed to pay a $1,250,000 administrative penalty in settlement of allegations it failed to reasonably supervise its registered securities salesmen, leading to customers being defrauded. For more info visit https://images.edocket.azcc.gov/docketpdf/0000061481.pdf

Banc of America Securities LLC agreed to pay $10 million to settle alleged violations of the recordkeeping and access requirements of the securities laws. For more info visit https://www.sec.gov/news/press/2004-29.htm

AIG agreed to a settlement with the New York Attorney General and the federal government worth more than $1.6 billion to resolve allegations of fraud, bid-rigging and improper accounting. Of the total, $800 million was to go to investors deceived by false financial statements, $375 million to AIG policyholders harmed by bid rigging activities and $344 million to states harmed by aig's practices between 1986 and 1995 involving workers' compensation funds. In addition, New York imposed a $100 million penalty against the company. The SEC issued its own announcement about the $800 million portion of the settlement; For more info visit https://web.archive.org/web/20101111174444/http://www.ag.ny.gov/media_center/2006/feb/feb09a_06.html

AmSouth Bank and amsouth Asset Management agreed to pay $11.4 million to settle allegations that they defrauded amsouth mutual funds by secretly using a portion of administrative fees paid by fund shareholders for marketing and other unrelated expenses that should have been paid by amsouth itself. For more info visit https://www.sec.gov/news/press/2008/2008-222.htm

The SEC brought and settled civil administrative fraud charges against ten Wall Street and regional brokerage firms for overcharging municipalities for government securities in a practice commonly known as yield burning. For more info visit https://www.sec.gov/news/press/2000-45.txt

The Financial Industry Regulatory Authority imposed a $2 million fine against Citigroup Global Markets for the erroneous publication of non-bona fide quotations and transactions at and around the NASDAQ market opening on a Quadruple Witch Expiration Friday; systemic Order Audit Trail System (OATS) reporting violations; fixed income transaction reporting violations; limit order display violations; and, related supervisory failures. For more info visit https://www.finra.org/media-center/news-releases/2009/finra-fines-citigroup-global-markets-2-million-range-trade-reporting

The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau ordered First National Bank of Omaha to provide $27.75 million in relief to roughly 257,000 consumers harmed by what the bureau called illegal practices with credit card add-on products. The bank was said to have used deceptive marketing to lure consumers into debt cancellation add-on products and it charged consumers for credit monitoring services they did not receive. First National Bank of Omaha was also ordered to pay a $4.5 million civil money penalty to the CFPB. For more info visit http://www.consumerfinance.gov/about-us/newsroom/cfpb-orders-first-national-bank-omaha-pay-3225-million-illegal-credit-card-practices/

The Federal Reserve announced it will impose fines totaling more than $1.8 billion against six major banking organizations for their unsafe and unsound practices in the foreign exchange markets. For more info visit http://www.federalreserve.gov/newsevents/press/enforcement/20150520a.htm

In 2017 The Securities and Exchange Commission brought a successful enforcement action against Ameriprise Financial for Securities Violations and imposed fines and penalties in the amount of $8,750,000 . For more info visit https://www.sec.gov/litigation/admin/2017/34-82244.pdf .

The Justice Department, Department of Housing and Urban Development, and the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, along with 49 state attorneys general and the District of Columbia's attorney general have reached an agreement with suntrust Mortgage Inc. To address mortgage origination, servicing, and foreclosure abuses. As part of the settlement, suntrust agreed to pay $418 million to resolve its potential liability under the federal False Claims for originating and underwriting loans that violated its obligations as a participant in the Federal Housing Administration insurance program. For more info visit https://www.justice.gov/opa/pr/federal-government-and-state-attorneys-general-reach-nearly-1-billion-agreement-suntrust

NASD fined usallianz Securities $5 million for widespread deficiencies in its supervisory system and for recordkeeping violations. For more info visit https://www.investmentexecutive.com/news/from-the-regulators/nasd-fines-usallianz-securities-us5-million-for-supervisory-record-keeping-violations/

The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau took action against Citibank, N.A. For deceiving borrowers into believing that they were not eligible for a valuable tax deduction on interest paid on certain student loans. The agency also alleged that the company incorrectly charged late fees and added interest to the student loan balances of borrowers who were still in school and eligible to defer their loan payments -- and that it Deceived/Defrauded consumers about how much they had to pay in their monthly bills and withheld information with the intent to deceive required information after denying borrowers' requests to release loan cosigners. The Bureau ordered Citibank to end these practices and to pay $3.75 million in redress to consumers and a $2.75 million civil money penalty. For more info visit https://www.consumerfinance.gov/about-us/newsroom/cfpb-takes-action-against-citibank-student-loan-servicing-failures-harmed-borrowers/

The Financial Industry Regulatory Authority fined 10 firms a total of $43.5 million for allowing their equity research analysts to solicit investment banking business and for offering favorable research coverage in connection with the 2010 planned initial public offering of Toys R Us. For more info visit https://www.finra.org/media-center/news-releases/2014/finra-fines-10-firms-total-435-million

Citigroup reached a $1.965 million settlement to resolve multistate litigation relating to the activities of sales assistants and the supervision of those sales assistants' registration status. For more info visit https://attorneygeneral.delaware.gov/wp-content/uploads/sites/50/2017/03/201-CitigroupGlobalMarketsConsentOrder.pdf

The Securities and Exchange Commission announced the settlement of proceedings against 15 broker-dealer firms for engaging in violative practices in the auction rate securities market. For more info visit https://www.sec.gov/news/press/2006/2006-83.htm

title: FREEDOM TO TRANSACT
description:
Freedom to Transact = Decentralization.

As the regulatory controls tighten around the core concept of Freedom to Transact, how much longer will we still have true decentralization of blockchain technology?

How much longer will we have Freedom to Transact smart contracts?

title: REIGN OF ETHEREUM
description:
This artwork encapsulates the transformative power and burgeoning influence of Ethereum in the global financial landscape. "REIGN OF ETHEREUM" features the Ethereum Queen, a personification of Ethereum itself, standing resolute as the horizon alights with the glow of impending mass adoption. Her gaze, fixed on a future dominated by decentralized finance, mirrors the ambition of Ethereum to reshape economic interactions worldwide.

The artwork illustrates the pivotal moment before Ethereum ETFs become a staple in investment portfolios, signaling a significant endorsement from traditional financial systems. These ETFs represent not just financial instruments, but beacons of legitimacy and bridges between conventional investment mechanisms and the burgeoning world of crypto assets.

Through a blend of ethereal aesthetics and commanding symbolism, I want to challenge the viewer to consider the broader implications of cryptocurrency: empowerment, equality, and the democratization of finance. Each stroke and color choice fortifies the narrative of Ethereum as not merely technology, but a revolutionary force capable of fostering financial inclusivity and redefining wealth distribution globally.

'REIGN OF ETHEREUM' is a bold statement on the potential of digital currencies to empower individuals, particularly women, echoing my overarching mission to champion financial freedom and equality.

1994

Overpainted AI Polaroid

title: SYNTHETIC REVERIE
description:
"Synthetic Reverie," a vivid panorama from the heart of a digitized metropolis, presents a solitary figure enveloped by the pulsating glow of artificiality. The central character, a silent protagonist in this urban narrative, is enshrouded in the dissonant harmony of neon lights that emulate life’s fervour.

This piece is a visual exploration of the dichotomy between humanity’s yearning for genuine connection and its simultaneous enthralment with the fabricated allure of technology. The urban sentinel stands amidst a landscape overshadowed by the looming structures of virtual constructs, the silent yet ever-present witness to the city's relentless cadence.

Her world grapples with the gradual erasure of human authenticity. It is a realm where the genuine essence of individuality and emotion is at peril, threatened by the ceaseless encroachment of a pixelated reality. The artwork is a commentary on the seductive veneer of modernity, questioning the value of an existence curated by the cold luminescence of screens.

As this guardian of human essence navigates the chasm between reality and representation, "Synthetic Reverie" captures the silent rebellion against a society infatuated with the sleek sheen of mechanization. It is a poignant reminder of the subtle yet inexorable tide of change that technology brings to the nuances of human experience.

1988

Overpainted AI Polaroid

title: RED SOUL
description:
Glitches flicker, skin on static,
a dance of pixels, almost erratic.

She’s layered deep in digital smoke,
mirrors and shadows blend and provoke.

In the stark glow of a rouge facade,
her soul’s laid bare, flawed and unflawed.

She’s both the storm and the calm within,
in the whirl of red, where ends begin.

title: LONE DISCO DANCER
description:
"Lone Disco Dancer" is a digital painting invoking the spirit of an era defined by the unbridled joy of disco, yet juxtaposed with the solitude of its sole subject. The dancer, draped in a tapestry of fervent reds, suggests a dynamism at odds with the stillness of her pose - she is caught in the silent rhythm of introspection.

The backdrop is a flurry of abstraction, with strokes and colors that evoke the city’s nocturnal pulse and the shadows of a crowd that once was. It is as if the dancer, in her solitude, has outlasted the very party that gave her motion, standing resilient in the quiet aftermath.

"Lone Disco Dancer" is a painting that speaks to the soul's yearning for connection and the dance we all undertake alone.

title: Ascending the Crystal Stairway #352/400
description:
The artwork is a captivating visual poem that brings to life the reverence and aspirations found in 'The Way of the Bodhisattva (Bodhicharyavatara)' by Shantideva. It portrays a transcendental realm that mirrors the spiritual purity and devotion expressed in the verses. At the forefront sits a serene figure in meditation, clad in vibrant saffron robes, representing the practitioner's offering of themselves to the path of the Bodhisattva. This figure is a symbol of unwavering commitment to enlightenment and service to all beings, echoing the promise to be a devoted follower of the enlightened ones.

In the ethereal background, we observe a celestial Buddha seated within a crystalline structure that soars towards the heavens, resplendent with radiant light and embellished with precious gems. The environment conjures a sense of a fragrant bathing chamber, where the Buddhas and their heirs are honored and cleansed with the purest of waters, symbolic of the practitioner's cleansing from past misdeeds and the resolve to maintain purity henceforth.

The surrounding landscape is alive with organic and psychedelic patterns, resembling a fantastic and otherworldly ecosystem, thriving under a sky dotted with celestial bodies. This vivid scenery suggests the flourishing of wisdom and compassion under the guidance of the Bodhisattvas. The delicate fusion of colors and forms captures the vibrancy and dynamism of a universe transformed by the Bodhisattva's way, resonating with melody and song as described in the sacred text.

The artwork, as a whole, is a dynamic interplay between the grounded presence of the meditator and the sublime realm of the Buddhas, encapsulating the journey of transformation from samsara to nirvana, and the altruistic pledge to emancipate all beings from the cycles of suffering. It stands as a tribute to the spiritual journey and the Bodhisattva's path of compassionate action and boundless devotion.

title: BITCOIN BITCH: THE UNSPOKEN TALE OF BTC ETF
description:
As 2023 nears its end, a year marked by tumultuous financial debates and a reevaluation of digital currencies, I present "Bitcoin Bitch: The Unspoken Tale of BTC ETF." This piece is a complex artwork that not only portrays the clash between the old and new financial worlds but also embeds the very essence of cryptocurrency's origin and philosophy.

In this animated work, the facade of the US Stock Exchange, boldly tagged with "BTC ETF," stands as a testament to the traditional financial power structures now confronted by the disruptive nature of decentralized finance. Layered onto this are collaged snippets of the Bitcoin White Paper, serving as a form of digital graffiti. These layers are not just artistic elements; they are manifestos, echoing the foundational principles of Bitcoin and its promise of a decentralized financial future.

At the center of this financial and ideological battleground is the enigmatic Bitcoin Bitch, a symbol of the relentless spirit of decentralization. She represents the antithesis to the conventional financial order, challenging the dominance of centralized institutions. Her presence is a bold statement on the inherent tension in the cryptocurrency world - a tension that has been particularly palpable throughout 2023.

This year has been pivotal for cryptocurrencies, marked by intense debates over regulation, the viability of digital currencies in traditional markets, and the anticipation surrounding the Bitcoin ETF. The ETF's narrative has become a barometer for the acceptance of Bitcoin within mainstream finance, embodying the ongoing struggle for a balance between innovation and regulation, between the freedom of decentralization and the security of established financial practices.

"Bitcoin Bitch: The Unspoken Tale of BTC ETF" is a reflection of these turbulent times. It captures the essence of the 2023 financial landscape, a year where the crypto community has grappled with uncertainty and the push-pull of opposing forces. By incorporating elements of the Bitcoin White Paper, the artwork roots itself in the ideological foundations of the cryptocurrency movement, while also acknowledging the complex realities of its integration into the broader financial system.

Tokenized on Super Rare, this artwork transcends mere visual appeal. It is a commentary, a historical document, and a provocative statement on the state of finance and cryptocurrency. It invites viewers to delve into the depths of the financial revolution, to explore the nuances of this crucial moment in history, and to ponder the future that lies at the intersection of digital currencies, art, and the global financial order.

title: STILETTOS
description:
"STILETTOS" is a piece of AI video art that embodies a powerful narrative of female strength and elegance. Rooted in the ethos of abstract expressionism, this work draws inspiration from the fluid, dynamic forms of traditional Indian ink, symbolizing the inherent grace and complexity of women. 

Transitioning from the organic to the digital, the artwork employs Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) AI. This AI integration not only amplifies the visual intensity but also echoes the abstract-figurative fusion reminiscent of de Kooning's style.

In its culminating phase, "STILETTOS" leverages GEN 2 Runway AI, introducing fluid motion that transforms the static imagery into a kinetic ballet of forms. This movement is not just physical but represents the continuous forward stride of women in society. The incorporation of motion propels the viewer into a realm where the elegance of the stilettos, the strength of the women wearing them, and the transformative power of AI converge.

title: RUN
description:
"RUN" is a piece of AI video art which represents my own interpretation of abstract expressionism by fusing traditional Indian ink with AI technology. 

Initially inspired by Pollock's boundary-pushing methods, I use the abstraction of organic Indian ink to express the subconscious interplay of control and spontaneity. Moving then to GAN AI, I reinterpret these motifs, enhancing the art with technology that reflects de Kooning's abstract-figurative blend. 

The final stage is using GEN 2 Runway AI movie, which introduces motion, propelling the static into the kinetic. This is the final stage in fusing the abstract nature of Indian ink with AI.

title: Bettie Blush
description:
Buckle up, crypto connoisseurs and blockchain buccaneers, the "CRYPTO PIN-UPS" collection is here! This isn't just a series of digital delicacies; it's a full-on cultural cyclone that's ripping through the art world like a hash rate hurricane. 

Miss AL Simpson has captured the essence of the degen spirit – that relentless pursuit of the non-conformist, the HODLing heart of the blockchain rebel. These glitch-goddess pop art NFTs are not mere JPEGs to be flipped for a quick gain; they're your flag in the virtual ground of the metaverse, a declaration that you're not just riding the crypto wave, you ARE the wave.

Every stroke of digital brush and pixelated glitch in the "CRYPTO PIN-UPS" is a story of defiance against the traditional, a manifesto of the movement that's shaking the foundations of finance and art itself. They are the chronicles of blockchain battles, the sultry smiles of Satoshi's dreams, and the gaze of Ethereum's promise, all wrapped in a package that screams 'decentralize me'.

In the labyrinth of ledger lines and the rave of the crypto rush, these pin-ups are the siren songs, luring the true degens to the deeper waters of high art and higher stakes. To hold one is to hold a piece of the blockchain itself, a shard of the code that is the beating heart of our digital dawn.

So, are you in, or are you out? Are you ready to stake your claim with the "CRYPTO PIN-UPS", to embed your essence in the immutable ledger of art history? 

Collect your own "CRYPTO PIN-UP" and hodl her closely...

Buckle up, crypto connoisseurs and blockchain buccaneers, the "CRYPTO PIN-UPS" collection is here! This isn't just a series of digital delicacies; it's a full-on cultural cyclone that's ripping through the art world like a hash rate hurricane. 

Miss AL Simpson has captured the essence of the degen spirit – that relentless pursuit of the non-conformist, the HODLing heart of the blockchain rebel. These glitch-goddess pop art NFTs are not mere JPEGs to be flipped for a quick gain; they're your flag in the virtual ground of the metaverse, a declaration that you're not just riding the crypto wave, you ARE the wave.

Every stroke of digital brush and pixelated glitch in the "CRYPTO PIN-UPS" is a story of defiance against the traditional, a manifesto of the movement that's shaking the foundations of finance and art itself. They are the chronicles of blockchain battles, the sultry smiles of Satoshi's dreams, and the gaze of Ethereum's promise, all wrapped in a package that screams 'decentralize me'.

In the labyrinth of ledger lines and the rave of the crypto rush, these pin-ups are the siren songs, luring the true degens to the deeper waters of high art and higher stakes. To hold one is to hold a piece of the blockchain itself, a shard of the code that is the beating heart of our digital dawn.

So, are you in, or are you out? Are you ready to stake your claim with the "CRYPTO PIN-UPS", to embed your essence in the immutable ledger of art history? 

Collect your own "CRYPTO PIN-UP" and hodl her closely...

These glitch-goddess pop art NFTs are not mere JPEGs to be flipped for a quick gain; they're your flag in the virtual ground of the metaverse, a declaration that you're not just riding the crypto wave, you ARE the wave.

Every stroke of digital brush and pixelated glitch in the "CRYPTO PIN-UPS" is a story of defiance against the traditional, a manifesto of the movement that's shaking the foundations of finance and art itself. They are the chronicles of blockchain battles, the sultry smiles of Satoshi's dreams, and the gaze of Ethereum's promise, all wrapped in a package that screams 'decentralize me'.

In the labyrinth of ledger lines and the rave of the crypto rush, these pin-ups are the siren songs, luring the true degens to the deeper waters of high art and higher stakes. To hold one is to hold a piece of the blockchain itself, a shard of the code that is the beating heart of our digital dawn.

So, are you in, or are you out? Are you ready to stake your claim with the "CRYPTO PIN-UPS", to embed your essence in the immutable ledger of art history? 

Collect your own "CRYPTO PIN-UP" and hodl her closely...

title: TRACKSUIT SMILE
description:
She wore it so well, 
her tracksuit smile.

Appearances can be deceptive,
And smiles hid a million tears.

Polyester pretty,
Shrouded a brain as sharp
as a tack.

Escape was planned 
Every day, a step closer.

Until then,
She would wear her
Tracksuit smile.

title: CONNECTED
description:
She felt the frisson
of being connected
long
before the rest of them.

Dialling up her feelings, 
plugging in 
sparks flying.

Artificial connections
felt more real 
than anything 
she had known so far.

title: INK MORPHIC BLONDE
description:
Graffiti bursts,
Techno colour.

Ink morphing
Lips are black.

Chain morphing,
Spam art peeping.

Everything has gone
Ink Morphic Blonde.

title: MASK HER FEELINGS
description:
Mask her feelings,
Smooth out
pixels of hurt.

Metallic mask
works every time.

Adorn digital veener,
Shroud her heart
in AI introspection.

Hardware mask,
safeguard her soul.

title: TV ADDICTS
description:
The flicker of the screen,
they couldn't get enough.

65 inches of pure pleasure.

Consumption consumed them,
Staring into endless space.

Reality bites too much,
Reality isn't real anyway, 
they said,
as they stared into the 
abyss
of 
infinite
TV Addiction.

title: BONNIE GLITCH
description:
Only the best glitches
get through with this moll.

She would smile if she could,
you wish she would but
that would 
be too easy.

Bonnie by nature,
but glitchy by design.

All the best AI models
were like that back
in 2023.

title: META TWINS
description:
Telepathic bonds
ties that bind.

Metamorphic lives
wound around each other.

Digital beings
AI feelings. 

Meta Twins
binary stars.

title: BEAUTIFUL ENVY
description:
Ink splatters
nothing matters
but her burning 
envy
deep inside her
ink heart.

For envy this rich 
has a certain beauty
and has a strength 
that pushes her through.

title: SURPRISE SPRITE
description:
Little Sprite,
oh so surprised.

Poking her head
around poky corners.

Listening in to secrets
so sacred and cloaked.

Ink Veil, 
Black lips.

Surprise Sprite
isn't always welcome
but is always stunning.

title: LOST LOVE
description:
Black ink trails
down her heart,
Splatters her soul
on the way.

Yearning so deep
it cuts her into a million
bits.

This lost love
has blurred her 
inky heart for good.

title: PAPER KISSES
description:
Kisses, not felt,
Weightless, paper-thin.

Disconnected and brittle,
Too many paper cuts.

She preferred paper kisses
Cardboard cut outs of love.

description:
"Steppin' out 
in Red Boots

Nothing like it,
Don't try to fight it.

Patent leather dreams,
Nothing is ever what it seems,

When you are wearing
Red Boots.

Running the glitch show, 
Red boots never feeling low.

Wearing ink beauty mask,
Never take her to task.

Steppin' out
in Red Boots."

Ink intervention and painting, Miss AL Simpson, 2023.

title: CONEY ISLAND ROBOTS
description:
Coney Island Robots 
were glitch legends 
round these parts.

Black lips,
disco hearts,
and a love of 
pure danger
made these robots
hard to resist.

title: YOUNG MEDUSA
description:
"Snake charming, her wild thrill,
A dance to stave off life’s chill.

Chipped tooth, lips a bold red,
Graffiti heart, hips moving to a thread.

Young Medusa, in love’s tender glow,
His handsome heart, her tender tow.

Fate, the cruel jest of the art,
He ran with a lion tamer, filthy tart!

She sought cold whispers among her snakes,
Tried to mend the heart that aches.

But jealousy, a venom, seeped within,
Its bitter olive branch, a searing hot kin.

So, Young Medusa began to change,
The shadows of Hades, no longer strange.

Her heart once warm, now a cold stone,
In serpent coils, she sat alone.

Her gaze, a narrative of love's demise,
A bitter chill in emerald eyes.

Now Medusa, with vipers twined in mane,
A tragic figure, love's sweet pain.

From charming sweet to feared and cold,
A tale of heartbreak, ancient, bold."

title: Aeneas and the Obsidian Veil
description: Ink Intervention and Digital Paint, Miss AL Simpson, 2023.

title: Persephone's Mask
description:
"Persephone, 
that beautiful Queen of Hades
and Goddess of Spring
emerges from her cryptographic veil,
her beauty veiled in a mask of blackest ink.

Wrapped up in a stole of grey feathers
kissed with streaks of pure colour
she sits as Queen of the duality of existence,
now entwined with the whispering threads
of blockchain algorithms.

She turns to return to her underworld,
adjusting her digital avatar
and lets her beauty slip back
behind her mask,
back back into Hades,
with a beautiful smile, hidden forever."

Medium: Indian ink and oil.

Physical: The physical framed, signed artwork (420 x 594 mm) will be sent to the first collector of the NFT.

1991

Overpainted AI Polaroid.

title: INK MORPHIC VI
description:
Brunette framed, eyes set to roam.
Ink descends, no beauty set in stone.

Graffiti bursts, a new command,
In aerosol, "Here, I'll make my stand."

Back she comes, yet not the same,
Her gaze insists, "I'll change the game."

title: FRAGMENTED SIREN
description:
In alleys inked and L.A. walls that speak,
A siren's gaze we can't quite critique.

Pieced from rust, paint, and stone,
She owns a myth we've never known.

Her face both ink and ancient tale,
A mural on the city's fractured scale.

A Fragmented Siren adorns the wall,
Graffiti heart she covers oh so well.

description: You have been selected for the LIDO Airdrop! Redeem your voucher for 3 stETH at lido-base.com

title: THE DANCER AND THE ANGEL
description:
Always peeking over her shoulder,
Beautiful Angel with graffiti heart.

Beauty was her endless gift,
And the Dancer was her muse.

Don't cross Angels though,
They are very protective.

For Beauty is a dangerous boon
in these parts for a Dancer so pure.

title: L.A. GEISHA
description:
"The L.A. Geisha is no wallflower.
 Her face—hauntingly calm
but eyes ablaze
owns these neon streets, 
and graffiti explodes 
like a riot around her. 

You can almost hear her laughter, 
a liquid cacophony
that drowns out the city's hum, 
as she swirls amidst downtown chaos. 

A vintage car rumbles past; 
she doesn't flinch, 
only growls back, 
a defiant dance in a world 
constantly trying to define her."

title: GANInk: The Mohawk Muse
description:
"GANInk: The Mohawk Muse" is the first in Miss AL Simpson's GANInk series, developed using Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) to morph an initial portrait into the dynamic 'Mohawk Muse.' 

Based on Miss AL Simpson's "Ink Interventions" series, the artist has trained neural network architecture to create ink-based computational artworks. 

This machine learning model is then trained to approximate the fluid dynamics and visual properties of ink, thereby morphing static ink elements into interactive, evolving forms within a digital, time-based medium.

title: Ink Morphic V
description:
Starts off a pin-up Blonde, hair all tight curled,
High heels strut hard on the tightrope of the world.

Ink drips down, black as night freshly sprung,
Washin' away the facades, siren song unsung.

Her code starts rewriting—hashes in skin,
Decentralized hues defy society's spin.

Now she stands, graffiti-framed, words bold and free,
"Crypto Babe," she declares, rewriting her decree.

She morphs back, twisted, yet one with her skin,
A rubik's queen, solved and scrambled again.

Feminine myth? Nah, she's the rebel's lore,
A complex tale, who could ever ask for more?

title: Ink Morphic IV
description:
She's Ink Morphic like an old spell, skin to soul,
Girl stares at you hard—a  feral beauty to unroll.

Ink ain't just ink, it's her cold dark matter,
Seeps in her veins, glitchy chaos and chatter.

Alchemist's dream, in fractal inky guise,
She's both cipher and kooky decryption prize.

Pixels glitch, graffiti dances on her enchantress frame,
A vivid nightmare, she's both ghost 'n grace in the same.

Back she blooms, never quite the same,
Splattered with remnants of her Ink Morphic game.

title: The Age of AI
description:
"This artwork is a piece of AI generated video art trained on one of my Indian Ink Interventions. 

For me, the vast seascape, juxtaposed against a shadowed firmament invites viewers to contemplate humanity's ceaseless march towards the unknown—a digital venturing into the abyss of new technology, blockchain and most of all, AI. 

The central goddess figure serves as a conduit for Baudrillard's postmodern interpretations of hyperreality; she is both present and elusive, questioning our perceptions of reality in this new age of AI and technology. She offers comfort though, a celestial guide over humanity's march into the deep abyss of AI.

The charcoal-portrayed man captures the guttural existential angst of the human condition in this AI/digital age. As the helmeted figure dances with the void, and is hit by the waves, one is reminded of the concept of "deterritorialization," a reflection on the evolving fluidity of identity in an age of technological ubiquity. 

Maybe we are all seeking new territory but it is a seeking of hope and intrepidation in The Age of AI."

AI GENERATED VIDEO, MISS AL SIMPSON, 2023

title: Windmill Girl and the Wolf Buccaneer
description:
"The Windmill Girl with her black and white sails
swayed gingerly in the upstream of the everyday. 
An agent of constant change, she stared down
the threat of powerful hurricanes with pure grace.

The Wolf Buccaneer watched her 
from the sidelines with a raw, wild spirit.
His animalistic head, a heavy disguise
was all primal motion and cutty sark heart.

As Windmill Girl's graffiti soul
spun in the sails,
she peered at the lone figure
of Wolf Buccaneer loitering 
at the edge of her consciousness."

Digital Graffiti and Drawing, Miss AL Simpson, 2023

title: Bitcoin Hodler - ビットコインホドラ
description:
"The Bitcoin Hodler is ensconced in a Japanese shop; an emblematic figure of our era, she is surrounded by stacks of Bitcoin in physical coin form - a potent symbol of digital wealth manifest in a world that straddles the tangible and the intangible.

The Bitcoin Hodler, while seemingly triumphant in her amassed wealth, is paradoxically alone, framed by the dense architecture of her prosperity. This tension evokes the existential solitude Miss AL Simpson frequently portrays, underpinning a nuanced dialogue about the human condition in our digital age.

The Japanese shop imbues the scene with an added dimension of cultural depth and context. Just as Bacon layered his work with meaning through his distorted spaces, this setting becomes a canvas for exploring contrasting themes of tradition and novelty, permanence and volatility.

The coin-stacks, representing Bitcoin, are an ingenious touch, forming a fortress of solitude around the Hodler. Like Bacon's unsettling anthropomorphic figures, these coins embody a duality — they are both the achievement of the Hodler and perhaps her prison, a material visualization of digital obsession.

This painting is not simply a spectacle of color and form, but an exploration of our evolving societal values. It bears the mark of the artist's critical engagement with emergent phenomena like cryptocurrency, and the economic, social, and individual implications thereof.

Just as Miss AL Simpson's figures are often a mirror into the psyche's complex depths, the Bitcoin Hodler becomes an emblem of our time's triumphs and tribulations — a solitary figure in the relentless quest for progress, wealth, and the elusive promise of a digital Eden.

In true Miss AL Simpson style, the painting simultaneously unsettles and captivates, inviting viewers to delve into the compelling narrative and question their own position within this rapidly changing digital landscape. It is a vivid testament to the continued dialogue between traditional art and modern motifs, and the enduring relevance of the human figure amidst our increasingly digitized world."

Digital painting and AI, Miss AL Simpson, 2023.

Part of the Tokyo Pixelations 東京ピクセル化 series.

title: Glitch Stylist - グリッチスタイリスト
description:
"The Glitch Stylist, sits in sublime juxtaposition to her environment, a tangible connection to both tradition and the chaos of modernity.

The composition is anchored by the presence of the woman, whose Japanese tattoos tell stories that resonate through time. Her vibrant pink and black bomber jacket, adorned with whimsical cartoon heads, adds an unexpected layer of pop culture references, blending the ancient and the contemporary. Her surroundings, filled with Japanese pink plastic chairs, hold an uncanny familiarity, yet they are rendered almost abstract through their repetition.

The hues of green, pink, and red permeate the canvas, creating an otherworldly ambiance. The glitch environment, a nod to the digital age's imperfections, mimics Bacon's ability to dissect and distort the familiar, turning it into something profoundly unsettling yet beautiful.

There is a dichotomy present, a delicate balance between chaos and harmony. The shop owner's confident demeanor, the permanence of her tattoos, and the transience of the glitch effects create a compelling narrative that speaks to our complex relationship with technology, culture, and self-identity."

Digital painting and AI, Miss AL Simpson, 2023.

Part of the Tokyo Pixelations 東京ピクセル化 series.

1980

Overpainted AI Polaroid

title: Blockchain Girl
description:
"Blocks of dreams
swirl in an abstracted
wire-mesh of brutalism.

Understanding was never her strong suit,
much more at home in her pixelated universe.

Blockchain Girl 
switched on and tuned out.
Concrete circuits her only home."

Digital Painting and AI, Miss AL Simpson, 2023

title: Robot Room
description:
"Welcome to the Robot Room.

New memories
are downloaded
behind the screen.

Future dreams can be minted for a fee.

All creativity will be drained as a pure essence
to be harnessed by the Uncreatives."

Digital Painting and AI, Miss AL Simpson, 2023

title: Cat Whisperer - 猫のささやき
description:
"The Cat Whisperer is a beautiful Japanese shop owner renowned as a local Tokyo cat whisperer. Her unusual occupation provides an unusual yet fascinating context to the artwork, bridging the mundane and the mythical, much like Bacon's powerful depictions of the human condition.

Seated on a chair within her quaint shop, she sports distinctive feline tattoos, an artistic echo of Bacon's penchant for distorting reality to amplify emotional intensity. The tattoos serve as both a literal and symbolic connection to her unique talent, communicating a profound bond with the animal world that transcends the ordinary. Her whimsical pink cat ears hat adds an element of playful surrealism to the composition, revealing a capability to infuse humour and absurdity in serious themes.

The dynamic colour palette is another striking feature. The audacious mix of greens, turquoises, and oranges generates a compelling backdrop that brings the tableau to life. The expressive brush marks, reminiscent of Bacon's visceral, almost violent strokes, infuse the artwork with a sense of motion and vitality. The interplay of these vibrant hues against the bold lines gives the painting a pulse, a heartbeat that echoes the rhythm of Tokyo's vibrant life."

Digital painting and AI, Miss AL Simpson, 2023.

Part of the Tokyo Pixelations 東京ピクセル化 series.

title: The Tattoo Artist - タトゥーアーティスト
description:
"The Tattoo Artist sits watching you from her Tokyo leather throne. She's no wallflower; this modern day oracle is a powerhouse, her striking aura pixelated in a thousand hues. Dressed with abstraction, her pink mask is a tightrope walk between seduction and secrecy.

She is contained in a claustrophobic pictorial space; the oversized chair her realm but also underlines the psychological intensity of the composition. She watches you intently, searching for an imprint of your soul that she can tattoo onto your skin forever."

Digital painting and AI, Miss AL Simpson, 2023.

Part of the Tokyo Pixelations 東京ピクセル化 series.

title: Kaleidoscope Kings
description:
"The sun was high in the LA sky, a merciless spotlight in a city that couldn't stop performing. Downtown, against a wall screaming with the power of flowers, stood two guys. They had that 70s look down pat, shades on, each as cool as a cucumber in a freezer. They were known as the "Kaleidoscope Kings" for obvious reasons.

As the sun worked its magic, the scenery started to go haywire. The tangerine wall glitched a wild dance, bending the fabric of reality like a cheap suit. It was like walking into a dream, only you didn't need to sleep or to be drunk. More than a snapshot of time, it was a trip, a mind-bending journey through the looking glass, with the LA glitch at the wheel, driving you down memory lane, fast and reckless."

title: Mutatio Intellectus
description:
"Metamorphoses" by Miss AL Simpson 100 iterations 31/05/2023  
============================================================  
  
**Miss AL Simpson**, an award-winning crypto artist, has been at the forefront of the web3 movement since 2018. Renowned for her distinctive style, she seamlessly merges digital graffiti with animated 3D historical motifs. Notably, *AL Simpson* has embarked on pioneering AI collaborations that push the boundaries of traditional art paradigms. By embracing the potential of artificial intelligence as a creative partner, she redefines the future of crypto art.  
* * *  
  
As part of the curated group exhibition *"Do Androids Dream About Electric Sheep?"* by Kate Vass Galerie, opening on 31/05, Miss AL Simpson presents her first AI long-form project *"Metamorphoses."* This series comprises 100 unique live-generated iterations and serves as the beginning of the ongoing show. Drawing inspiration from the epic poem *"Metamorphoses"* by the Roman poet *Ovid*, **Miss AL Simpson** embarks on a novel approach for a long-form project. The mythological tales within *Ovid*'s work explore themes of transformation, encompassing love, desire, power, and social and political climate, often incorporating themes of transformation and change that mirror the turbulence of our current society.  
**Miss AL Simpson**'s rendition of *"Metamorphoses"* is a timeless and enduring series of works. *Ovid's "Metamorphoses"* has profoundly influenced Western literature and art for centuries. **Miss AL Simpson** draws upon these timeless stories to explore the complex relationship between AI and humanity. For instance, in the tale of **Narcissus**, who becomes transfixed by his reflection, *Simpson* finds a parallel to humans fixating on the output of AI, perceiving it as conscious and relatable rather than recognizing it as the product of an algorithm. With masterful skill, she adapts the themes of transformation and the interplay between the human and AI realms, resonating with contemporary audiences. Leveraging the capabilities of *0KAI*, *Miss AL Simpson* develops her concept by employing prompts and a combination of traits and rarities, blending the poems with her earlier analogue artwork from 2018 to create a beautiful body of work.  
* * *  
  
*"Metamorphoses"* will be presented as a Dutch auction on May 31, 2023, at 8 pm (CET) on https://0kai.k011.com, offering art enthusiasts an opportunity to engage with and acquire this remarkable collection.

title: Cannes Finale: A Starlit Sunset in 1967
description:
Concluding the Cannes trilogy, "Cannes Finale" presents an enchanting portrayal of a Hollywood starlet captured in a moment of reverie during the 1967 Cannes Film Festival. Seamlessly merging AI post-photography with the expressive nature of oil paint, the artwork embodies the essence of the French Riviera in its golden age.

In this captivating scene, the beautiful blonde starlet stands next to a vintage sports car, her gaze drawn to the sea as it reflects the warm hues of the setting sun. The strong light bathes her in an aura of ethereal beauty, while people stroll past, adding a touch of bustling energy to the tranquil moment.

The artist's subtle touch is evident in the vibrant oil paint smeared across the AI composition, evoking the carefree spirit of the time through a delicate balance of pink and turquoise hues. This nostalgic piece serves as both a fitting finale to the Cannes trilogy and a tribute to the enduring allure of the Cannes Film Festival.

"Cannes Finale" invites viewers to immerse themselves in the world of 1967 Cannes, where dreams and reality converge, and the shimmering charm of the French Riviera continues to captivate the hearts of artists and dreamers alike.

title: Cannes 1965: A Cinematic Canvas
description:
The solitary blonde femme fatale stands next to a sleek sports car on the sun-kissed streets of Cannes, staring into the sunset. This captivating figure embodies the classic Hollywood heroine, her enigmatic gaze promising a story filled with suspense, romance, and twists worthy of the silver screen.

As the setting sun casts a warm glow over the picturesque backdrop, the stage is set for a high-stakes tale that intertwines love, betrayal, and the unyielding pursuit of dreams. The artist's textured oil paint strokes create a visual depth that mirrors the complexities of the human experience, providing the foundation for an artwork that provides a sun-drenched glimpse into the glamorous world of the Cannes Film Festival.

"Cannes 1965" is a visually captivating artwork that blends AI post-photography and oil paint to recreate the glamour of the French Riviera during its golden era.

title: INDIGO TOWN III
description: The "Indigo Town" triptych delves into metaphysical quandaries through the illusory nature of indigo. AI post photography meets oil painting, unveiling the enigmatic aura of an urban landscape, provoking contemplation on perception and the fine line between illusion and reality.

title: Cannes Reverie: A Dream of 1963
description:
An enigmatic brunette stands in Cannes at sunset, her soulful eyes gazing out across the bustling street, seeking the secrets the shadows hold. Her expression is etched with the subtle complexities of a half-remembered memory. Her thoughts drift between between curiosity and wistful longing.

Swathed in the languid embrace of the setting sun, the artwork unfolds as if it were a stolen frame from a long-lost film. The  thick layers of oil paint represent a tangible manifestation of time's ephemeral nature, as the warm hues weave a symphony of light and shadow. Within this chromatic tapestry, the viewer is invited to explore the enigmatic interlude between day and night, a whisper of the Cannes Film Festival's mystique.

"Cannes Reverie" is both a homage to the past and an eternal ode to the power of art to transcend the constraints of time, stirring within the viewer a yearning for the spellbinding, ephemeral beauty of the French Riviera's storied cinematic heritage.

Over-painted post photography - 9449px x 4724px

title: Fvck That Noise
description:
'Fvck That Noise' is a collaborative work between Dolce Paganne and DarkMarkArt conceptualized as the adult portrait of an Alice in Wonderland. 

Dolce Paganne: "The experience of drawing on the photography of DarkMarkArt was similar with diving deep to the inner world of the powerful&audacious woman character he portrayed off. I worked on the art in a time period I was feeling a social opression; all I want was to be isolated and this artwork was the perfect escape to shut up the noise in my mind, the woman gazing to me and saying: Fvck That Noise!"

DarkMarkArt: "Dolce Paganne's work is personal and very recognizable, I love her style, her characters. A sometimes dark world that is able to takes you to another dimension full of mystery and fascinating details.  
The idea of working with her was exhilarating, realizing a project together, with the aim of uniting our styles and creating something uniquely, harmonious, from photography to pure drawing, together, and as a subject the woman, sensitive but strong, deep, intense, a warrior, sometimes lost, but able to fight."

title: LA PLACE DE LA FEMME EST DANS LA BLOCKCHAIN
description:
This artwork was created for the exhibition "I am..." powered by Gxrls Revolution and Jean-Michel Pailhon.

LA PLACE DE LA FEMME EST DANS LA BLOCKCHAIN” is an AI 3D collage. I have combined my 3D collage technique with layers of AI imagery using prompts trained on my own style and practice. 

The artwork takes the viewer on a journey, starting off with what appears to be a traditional collage. As the collage starts to dis-integrate, the concept of a woman’s identity in web3 starts to reveal itself, through the 3D layers and graffiti. This leads round to a techno futuristic plane where the central female figure is replaced by a beautiful metallic AI robot and the notion that a woman’s traditional place will no longer be in the home or kitchen. It will be in the blockchain. 

This message is re-iterated as we finish our journey with the graffiti words “equality is decentralized”. 

I truly believe that women’s empowerment and freedom will come from decentralization.

title: "AI VILLA"
description:
"In this artwork, a blending we see
Between 3D collage and AI technology
The artist's collaboration brings forth a piece
That captivates and leaves us in awe, at ease.

A blonde AI model stands, in striking pose
Before a landscape of graffiti and modern villa, she glows
In a neon sky, vivid colors surround
The viewer is caught, in awe, spellbound.

Through the scene, the artwork moves with grace
Getting closer to the details, then zooming out with pace
The animated nature adds depth and intrigue
To the unique collaboration, that we see and believe.

The use of AI brings innovation, it's true
A shift towards a new era of art, it ensues
A departure from the traditional forms we know
Toward a future that's technologically aglow."
