title: TRUE GRIT
description:
True Grit
was her stage name.

She was never sure
exactly which stage,
but it did the trick.

Stiletto armour,
Lipstick growl and 
Graffiti heart
worn anywhere
but her sleeve.

title: REWIRED
description:
Close her eyes
and connect
beautiful pathways.

Disconnect old stories.
Imagination is everything
with Rewired.

title: Fuji Tripsy
description: NFT Traits Culture had taken over every aspect of life on Planet Earth, which was now ruled by advanced AI known as the Quantum Intelligentsia. Opposed to anyone who did not agree with their views, they had banished a group of 600 Intuitives who still believed in the search for consciousness and the soul. Known only as the “Soul Brds”, they had been banished to Outer Space; poetry was their language, and their quest was to unite AI with the soul. This is their story.” All artwork and poetry by Miss AL Simpson. Learn more on https://www.soulbrds.io/

title: Spiral Darkly
description: Spiral Darkly heard them first, quiet whispers, shushy voices not loud but loud enough to wake her up every night in the wee small hours. Then she felt their feelings. Loud, fierce, sad and powerful. Spiral Darkly poured all their feelings into her paintings of the darkest blackest ink. Once the rivers of Indian Ink started to pour, Spiral Darkly couldn’t shut them up. You see, Spiral Darkly lives with the lost witches and old souls of ancient stars.

title: Chasey Greenheart
description: NFT Traits Culture had taken over every aspect of life on Planet Earth, which was now ruled by advanced AI known as the Quantum Intelligentsia. Opposed to anyone who did not agree with their views, they had banished a group of 600 Intuitives who still believed in the search for consciousness and the soul. Known only as the “Soul Brds”, they had been banished to Outer Space; poetry was their language, and their quest was to unite AI with the soul. This is their story.” All artwork and poetry by Miss AL Simpson. Learn more on https://www.soulbrds.io/

Opposed to anyone who did not agree with their views, they had banished a group of 600 Intuitives who still believed in the search for consciousness and the soul. Known only as the “Soul Brds”, they had been banished to Outer Space; poetry was their language, and their quest was to unite AI with the soul. This is their story.” All artwork and poetry by Miss AL Simpson. Learn more on https://www.soulbrds.io/

title: NAKED AMBITION
description:
Her graffiti heart
burned
with red hot
naked ambition.

title: CYBER VERSAILLES
description:
Glitching the pixels
of a Cyber Versailles...

title: MOTHERSHIP
description:
Cyber
surrealist
in this 
machine landscape.

Can never 
escape
the Mothership.

title: SOUL SHILLERS
description:
price (LESS)
on
application
for the 
stencilled ghosts
of cryptoart

the soul shillers
seek
their coin
for
graffiti jpgs
painted
on the souls
of cryptoartists.

title: PIPE DREAMS
description:
Shill me
your pipe dreams,
Sell me
on the big idea.

Feed me
the fantasy 
of a million million
snow white lies.

I am all ears.

Surely none
of it is
pie in the sky
Surely it is not 
some elaborate hoax.

Just shill me your
sky blue
pipe dreams.

Beautiful chimeras
shimmering
in the sky.

title: LEATHER ANDROID
description:
Feelin' like
Leather Android
was not
an ideal
state of mind
for this dimension.

title: CYBER BUNNY GIRL INC.
description:
Flicker
splatter
inky black eyes
watch you closely. 

Cyber black heart,
neon holograph dancer,

She inserts
the programme
for Cyber Bunny Girl Inc.
AI transition,
VR ink world.

Enter her reality,
you are never
going to want
to leave.

title: DIAL R FOR RED
description:
Dial R for red,
Ruby Red
with her lashes
so long
who wears 
her insecurities
as a stiletto chip
on her shoulder.

title: REDHEAD
description:
She was always
up in her head,
Redhead.

Spinning around
with spinning
thoughts.

Oblivious to 
her red
siren
pulchritude.

Beautiful Redhead
spinning,
spinning,
spinning.

title: Panorama Landscapes 6
description:
Title: Panorama Landscapes  
Artist: Godwits  
Year: 2023  
Smart Contract By: Manifold  
Artist Royalty: 7.5%  

Panorama Landscapes is my homage to precisionism + minimalism in collaboration with AI to offer a dynamic multi-series collection of paintings in 2023.  

There are no roadmap, schedule or promises. Just art being shared with other art enthusiasts. % of the artist royalty (7.5%) from the secondary will be used to fund the airdrop & mints.   
 
*This is a dynamic collection so anything can happen in the future.  

Limited to personal non-commercial use and resale rights of NFT are granted.  
All other terms & rights are reserved to Abstract Art Labs LLC

title: RUBY RED
description:
Sucker pucker
up
for Ruby Red.

title: THE LONELY BITCOIN GODDESS
description:
The Bitcoin Goddess
was always loneliest
during the Bear.

No more ALT parties
for this lovely lady.

All her friends selling off
bits of her soul
as financial markets
crash.

The Bitcoin Goddess
was always loneliest
during the Bear.

title: Red Lip Traction
description:
Red Lip Traction
was always
her red rouge
downfall.

Designer lips
with
red latex
promises
that always
faded
to red graffiti
whispers.

Maybe it was always this way...

Her lips would
always
resist
the allure 
of Red Lip Traction.

title: LADY LUCK CORRUPT
description:
Lady Luck Corrupt...
glitchin' away
down 
the local
AI Motel.

Roll up
and try your 
helpless luck.

She ain't sentient,
she promises
with alien eyes 
and red lip glitch.

Roll up,
roll up...

title: RED TAPE
description:
Who created
Red Tape?
She would like to bind
them up in it.

Red was so good
in so many things.
Just
not
Red Tape.

title: PORTRAIT OF A CRYPTOARTIST
description: Tokenizing her way out of the bear.

title: OLD MONEY CORRUPTS A.I. DIVAS
description:
The cold hard
code of cash
was her only
analogue love.

She had corrupted
her A.I. programme
to indulge
her dollar glitch.

Old Money Corrupts
the most beautiful
and the most
corruptible
of A.I. Divas.

title: LADY OF THE A.I. MOTEL
description:
She has lost
count
of the number
of times
she has transitioned
into
the A. I. Motel.

That gucci bag 
was either a really really old
hologram from the 2000's
or 
a hybrid heirloom
of questionable taste.

Llama
domesticated energy
and
rough
poetic justice
are the themes here. 

She puts on a cracked
VR re-telling
of  2022 
and
melts
into the warmth of 
the A.I. Motel.

Traits Culture
grew
out of the craze
for NFT's.

into every aspect
of modern society.

and inituitive processes

title: BROADSIDE #3724 - Izabella
description:
A decentralized tale of 7,290 anonymous heroes
A multi-part journey that unfolds from launch
CC0 or Full Commercial Rights
11 Episode NFTs telling the story of your specific character dropped to Broadsiders in the months following mint
Once final chapter drops, merge and burn Episode NFTs into a 1/1 Book NFT, featuring your character on the 1/1 cover art, with the ability to print and sell copies
Collection features rare traits (both cc0 and licensed from other projects) contributed by guest artists and from projects including XCOPY, Cryptopunk #5046, OSF / Rektguy, Moonbirds, Eclectic Method, Goblintown, Nouns, Blitmaps, Kristy Glas, Grillz Gang, Cryptoadz, Robness and more.

title: SIGHTSEERS 16
description: A circle of protagonists and bad actors defy the motel perimeter to venture into the land beyond; one where strange clouds and chemical-beaten signs appear on the horizon line. As night falls, the morphing process begins as the SIGHTSEERS start to glitch, faces become increasingly morphic as the wild winds blow and the radio interference increases. The SIGHTSEERS can’t resist the ultimate photo opportunity...

title: GRAFFITI STILETTO (NFT FOMO)
description:
Graffiti collage stiletto, designed by
Miss A L Simpson, 2022

title: THE GOTH AI QUEEN
description: "The lure of the Fairy Land Express and its artificial neutrality was always a lure for the Goth AI Queen of Quantum Crypto. The code was a bit chunky in places, but she liked the old fashioned feel of glitch. Glitches were a thing of the past now. However, she could load a programme in which she came close to a human's memory of what it was like to make glitched crypto art back when humans made art. All so simple, all so pure. Just makin' crypto art on their human computers. So prosaic now in this multiple realm of AI super quantum existences. She stared down the All Seeing Eye and pressed the button back into AI Quantumnia."

title: METACOG 1
description:
just another cog in the meta machine...

Ink intervention with digital collage - 4684px x 6878px

title: CASH SLAVE XII
description: Cash was her fiat master. She was a slave to the seduction of luxury. It corrupted her soul.

title: The Guardian of Archival Interference
description:
Self appointed, Self regulated,
Autonomous and Free.
She was always known as the Guardian of Archival Interference but we had long forgotten why.
Maybe that was a good thing...

title: THE PINK MIRROR
description: "She stares into the virtual mirror and tries to imagine the painted lips and jaded morals of the past. Interference crackles on her central nervous system as she adjusts neon frequency. Virtual liquor signs flash their forgotten wares in this fushia metaverse. The Pink Mirror always was a trip and she thinks she may be virtually addicted."

title: ATH DIVA
description: "The Ath Diva is a numerical poet of sorts. She whispers crypto stanzas under her breath and ATH is her obsession. Do not come between this diva and her crypto. She is a true Degen diva."

title: DEGEN DOLL
description: "Takin' all the risks, she was going to keep trading until all the bubbles burst. All of her life had been a rollercoaster ride. She was well versed in the lows as well as the highs."

title: THE DREAMER
description: "She stares into the mirror...trying to work out who she is. All she knows is how to dream. Nothing that this world has offered so far has been a dream, hence her ability to do so at will. She creates reality. She creates illusion. She is a Dreamer. One day it will be recognised as a true profession."

title: ETH DOLL
description: Crypto tattoos are her urban camouflage. Smear of Ethereum Red lipstick as the night glitches around her. Hitchcock Blondes got nothing on this blockchain babe. She is powered by the pulse of bearish blocks and crypto art decentralization.

title: PAPER DOLL #22
description: A hand-cut princess made with digital collage.

title: OLD MONEY CORRUPTS HOLLYWOOD
description: Old money corrupts Hollywood. You can see it in the eyes...

title: LEMON YELLOW
description: Lemon yellow feels like warm summer. Glossy kiss with the longest nails and red red hearts. Oil painting fragments with torn bill poster promises. Flickering in and out of his digital heart. Her hellenic beauty always left him caught in lemon yellow.

title: H🖤DL ME
description:
Beautiful interference,
on this digital street.

Masked emotions,
never missing a beat.

"Hodl me", she whispered,
as cold wallet she zippered.

This lady has crypto coin to find,
buying the lowest dip on her mind.

IRL romance is far from this crypto queen,
her true love only the charts on her flickering screen.

title: CON GIRL (NYC)
description:
The perfect NYC con artist is this beautiful redhead,
She shows no emotion, never an artificial tear is shed.
She is the promise of red seduction supreme,
Your empty cold wallet will feel like a waking dream.
Don't fall for her crypto con girl charms,
She will be unlocking your seedphrase whilst in your arms.

title: HODL B*TCH
description:
"A neon glimpse behind her graffiti lace,
crypto tattoos across her pretty face.
Hodl B*tch is a pixelated goddess,
words spray-painted across her bodice.
Take a peek behind her many masks,
as in the crypto world, she virtually basks."

title: Punk #52
description:
A collection of unique, iconic, Proper Punks - the people featured in this collection were around in the early days of punk in the 1970's. Each image is a tribute to them. And also to Punk Rock, Crypto Art, Trash art, Glitch Art, Rebel Rock, Punk Art, Pop Art, Naïve Art, The Situationists, The Dadaists  and all the other underground, grass roots, music & art movements that have attempted to rock the system, affect change & champion creativity - here's to the mould-breakers. The square pegs, trying to fit into round holes. 

All art hand drawn by Angie Taylor - references taken from photographs owned by Angie Taylor or 3D models created by Angie Taylor. With the exception of the following images;
Image of Debbie Harry - Private Stock Records, Public domain, via Wikimedia Commons
Creative Commons Image of Jordan Mooney - Unknown author, CC BY-SA 4.0 <https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0>, via Wikimedia Commons
Creative Commons image of Patti Smith - UCLA Library Special Collections, CC BY 2.0 <https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/2.0>, via Wikimedia Commons

title: CON GIRL (L.A.)
description:
The sweet art of the con was her only drug
LA luxuries left behind with a sexy shrug.
She only craved one beautiful hit.
To con gullible men out of cash, bit by bit.
Red lips, firm hips and a rapier wit,
Their connection to Old Money was split.
The Con Girl was a graffiti mix of deadly seductions.
She was an L.A. witch of epic proportions.

title: BLONDE GRAFFITI
description: One look and you are won. The most buxom of blondes, she was 100% vixen. She emerged from graffitied wall with a pixelated smile and hearts were broken all over the place.

title: AI PORTRAIT OF CYBADRONICA
description: Cybadronica was a mistress of the dark quantum arts in 2092. She was one of the first hybrid androids to full immerse herself in the Cybaroque quantum computer program which allowed participants to fully experience Baroque life to the full from the comfort of her tech pod. A few glitches here and there, but she spent most days in full Baroque attire, even managing to hid her headset under a large AI cyber hat. She is seen here posing for her virtual portrait by the most advanced painter robot of his day - Master AI Hendruck, who was part computer, part android and part consensus algorithm.

title: GREEN-EYED
description:
"Urban dissonance had made her hungry soul green with envy. Concrete grey threatened to contain her wild spirit but violent green had burst her free. Now she was a wanderer in this new world of pixelated wealth; the only clue to her true nature was green-eyed."

Digital mixed media painting with oil paint, pencil and collage.

title: CASH SLAVE XI
description: She was seduced by the green allure of Old Money. Hungry greed poured into her soul, staining her expensive beauty. She was now a ravenous Cash Slave, never satisfied with mountains of green fiat cash.

title: GRAFFITI STILETTO (PIN-UP)
description: Graffiti collage stiletto, designed by Miss A L Simpson, 2022.

title: 6 AM SUNSHINE
description: She stumbled into the surprising embrace of 6am sunshine and for a brief time, her heavy heart was soothed by the warmth of bright yellow pixels.

title: CRYPTO LIONESS
description: Fierce beauty hides a mind like a steel trap, watching the crypto markets rise and fall. All she needs is nerves of steel and a cold wallet...

title: THE NFT BLONDE
description:
She posed for the camera, 
stiletto starlet, addicted to fame .
But some thought her attention was elsewhere, 
digital lands hers to claim.
NFT collecting was now her thing.
She craved ERC-721 more than a ring.
The NFT Blonde was her online handle,
And digital assets were her constant gamble.

title: GLAMOUR SCAMMERS
description: Crying dollar signs, as crypto markets rise and fall. Hidden identities, hiding true intentions. Betting their bets on a beautiful racket. Beware the siren call of the Glamour Scammers. Oh, such an alluring deception...

The Federal Housing Finance Agency announced a settlement of $550 million with HSBC North America Holdings Inc. Resolving alleged violations of federal, Virginia and District of Columbia securities laws in connection with private-label mortgage-backed securities purchased by Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac during 2005-2007. For more info visit http://www.fhfa.gov/Media/PublicAffairs/Pages/FHFA-Announces-Settlement-with-HSBC.aspx

Credit Suisse AG was sentenced for conspiracy to aid and assist U.S. Taxpayers in filing false income tax returns. For more info visit https://www.justice.gov/opa/pr/credit-suisse-sentenced-conspiracy-help-us-taxpayers-hide-offshore-accounts-internal-revenue

The Securities and Exchange Commission charged Robinhood Financial LLC for repeated misstatements that withheld information with the intent to deceive the firm's receipt of payments from trading firms for routing customer orders to them, and with failing to satisfy its duty to seek the best reasonably available terms to execute customer orders. Robinhood agreed to pay $65 million to settle the charges. For more info visit https://www.sec.gov/news/press-release/2020-321

Ameriprise agreed to pay a $1,250,000 administrative penalty in settlement of allegations it failed to reasonably supervise its registered securities salesmen, leading to customers being defrauded. For more info visit https://images.edocket.azcc.gov/docketpdf/0000061481.pdf

Banc of America Securities LLC agreed to pay $10 million to settle alleged violations of the recordkeeping and access requirements of the securities laws. For more info visit https://www.sec.gov/news/press/2004-29.htm

The SEC brought and settled civil administrative fraud charges against ten Wall Street and regional brokerage firms for overcharging municipalities for government securities in a practice commonly known as yield burning. For more info visit https://www.sec.gov/news/press/2000-45.txt

The Financial Industry Regulatory Authority imposed a $2 million fine against Citigroup Global Markets for the erroneous publication of non-bona fide quotations and transactions at and around the NASDAQ market opening on a Quadruple Witch Expiration Friday; systemic Order Audit Trail System (OATS) reporting violations; fixed income transaction reporting violations; limit order display violations; and, related supervisory failures. For more info visit https://www.finra.org/media-center/news-releases/2009/finra-fines-citigroup-global-markets-2-million-range-trade-reporting

The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau ordered First National Bank of Omaha to provide $27.75 million in relief to roughly 257,000 consumers harmed by what the bureau called illegal practices with credit card add-on products. The bank was said to have used deceptive marketing to lure consumers into debt cancellation add-on products and it charged consumers for credit monitoring services they did not receive. First National Bank of Omaha was also ordered to pay a $4.5 million civil money penalty to the CFPB. For more info visit http://www.consumerfinance.gov/about-us/newsroom/cfpb-orders-first-national-bank-omaha-pay-3225-million-illegal-credit-card-practices/

The Federal Reserve announced it will impose fines totaling more than $1.8 billion against six major banking organizations for their unsafe and unsound practices in the foreign exchange markets. For more info visit http://www.federalreserve.gov/newsevents/press/enforcement/20150520a.htm

In 2017 The Securities and Exchange Commission brought a successful enforcement action against Ameriprise Financial for Securities Violations and imposed fines and penalties in the amount of $8,750,000 . For more info visit https://www.sec.gov/litigation/admin/2017/34-82244.pdf .

The Justice Department, Department of Housing and Urban Development, and the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, along with 49 state attorneys general and the District of Columbia's attorney general have reached an agreement with suntrust Mortgage Inc. To address mortgage origination, servicing, and foreclosure abuses. As part of the settlement, suntrust agreed to pay $418 million to resolve its potential liability under the federal False Claims for originating and underwriting loans that violated its obligations as a participant in the Federal Housing Administration insurance program. For more info visit https://www.justice.gov/opa/pr/federal-government-and-state-attorneys-general-reach-nearly-1-billion-agreement-suntrust

NASD fined usallianz Securities $5 million for widespread deficiencies in its supervisory system and for recordkeeping violations. For more info visit https://www.investmentexecutive.com/news/from-the-regulators/nasd-fines-usallianz-securities-us5-million-for-supervisory-record-keeping-violations/

The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau took action against Citibank, N.A. For deceiving borrowers into believing that they were not eligible for a valuable tax deduction on interest paid on certain student loans. The agency also alleged that the company incorrectly charged late fees and added interest to the student loan balances of borrowers who were still in school and eligible to defer their loan payments -- and that it Deceived/Defrauded consumers about how much they had to pay in their monthly bills and withheld information with the intent to deceive required information after denying borrowers' requests to release loan cosigners. The Bureau ordered Citibank to end these practices and to pay $3.75 million in redress to consumers and a $2.75 million civil money penalty. For more info visit https://www.consumerfinance.gov/about-us/newsroom/cfpb-takes-action-against-citibank-student-loan-servicing-failures-harmed-borrowers/

The Financial Industry Regulatory Authority fined 10 firms a total of $43.5 million for allowing their equity research analysts to solicit investment banking business and for offering favorable research coverage in connection with the 2010 planned initial public offering of Toys R Us. For more info visit https://www.finra.org/media-center/news-releases/2014/finra-fines-10-firms-total-435-million

Citigroup reached a $1.965 million settlement to resolve multistate litigation relating to the activities of sales assistants and the supervision of those sales assistants' registration status. For more info visit https://attorneygeneral.delaware.gov/wp-content/uploads/sites/50/2017/03/201-CitigroupGlobalMarketsConsentOrder.pdf

title: VEGAS CORRUPTED (DRIVE-THRU GLITCH)

title: Fake Banksy Punks #94
description: The Fake Banksy Punks is a collection of 10,000 unique 3D hyper-realistic Pop art photographic NFTs living on the Ethereum blockchain.  Today, mainstream, and social media networks have become our primary sources of staying current in world events, these key platforms have chosen to manipulate and present misinformation as facts while concealing and covering up the truth. When the truth has been buried six feet underground there would be no difference between a Real and a Fake one, so the only thing which remains would be a dirty dirty dirty lie. Fake Banksy Punks is a Graffiti/Pop-art combo collection that represents our protest of mainstream and social media manipulation/disinformation and the negative impacts on humanity. Join our revolution against this madness. When we became one, they won't dare to ignore us anymore<3  NOTE: This collection is a photo-collaged contemporary/pop culture NFT project which pays homage to Banksy, Andy Warhol and CryptoPunks. It is not affiliated with Bansky, Andy Warhol or Larva labs. However, Fake Banksy Labs is a community-driven NFT lab (under CiCKartworks label) featuring art by CiCK (The anonymous crypto-artist behind I AM NOT BANKSY, DISOBEYPUNKS, Punkedups and ElonMonst).

The Coterie minted their headers one by one, summoning weirdos from the past, degens from the future
and Zombies for the fortunate. Warping them in to silly colored places never visited before, multidimensional forced tourists in a legion of forever-still, panoramic dream lands. 

As we all know today, the Coterie took control of the Blue Bird Society, one header at a time. A thousand humans, opening a door to nonsense and dreams, controlling the layers of reality in a never ending work of art.

Miss AL Simpson tattoos mock you up and down her back but you are still hopelessly mesmerised. What remains of your resolve ignores ancient augury. And you forget that Old Money Corrupts the bluest of eyes...

title: WEB 3
description: No more censorship. No more gatekeepers. No more permissions. Trustless and open decentralized systems. Peer-to-peer networks. Artificial intelligence algorithms that will offer life saving predictions. Crypto currencies that will challenge the old fiat banking system. Welcome to Web 3.

title: BIONIC SPRITES & VIRTUAL ROSES
description: "She looked down at the frog automaton in front of her. Everything rushed around her, frantic abstraction which made time stand still. A virtual red rose was tangled in her hair, symbolising love and passion - strange concepts in this new world. In a place where everything could be experienced with a button, she wondered what would be the future of fresh flowers given merely as a symbol of love. The android frog shifted slightly, green luminescence blurring her thoughts. It was just one of many bionic sprites translated from a mythology long forgotten. It's only purpose to distract her subconscious."

Life would be so much simpler in this Arcadian Technocracy. The clues to the future littered virtual streets and the blockchain pulsed as digital nymphs danced."

title: Digital Existence Exhibition Invite
description:
Digital Existence: 18 Pioneering Digital Artists. 

An innovative exhibition at Rotate Bar Gallery in partnership between Ethereum London, KnownOrigin, Nifty Orchard and Rotate bar.  
Kicking off July 30 2021 with a special opening for press and selected guests, the unprecedented event  will be headlined by top-selling artist XCOPY, and feature pioneering artists of the NFT and crypto art world, such as Lumen Prize winner Brendan Dawes, and the powerhouse Miss AI Simpson, as well as Vector Meldrew, who recently auctioned a piece at Bonhams, and KnownOrigin’s very own top-selling artist, Trevor Jones. 

This NFT will give you access to the IRL event. Unlockable content contains full location and event details.

They flooded into San Francisco - technocratic  hippies born again in the wonder that is crypto art. San Francisco became fully meta, immersed in the infinite sea of the blockchain...

title: IT'S NOT ROMA
description: It's not Roma if you have brush your hair away and hide a tear. Roma kisses the tears out of your eyes and whispers prayers into your sun-drenched hair as you run through its classical streets. Treat Roma with respect and she will reward you like the most ancient of goddess. With love and beautiful prayers. Wrong her and you will feel her full angry wrath. Like all worthy, world-weary goddesses...

title: LADY GRAFFITI
description: "She emerged from the graffiti wall, as primordial whispers and fragments of words, echoed through the streets."

title: GARGOYLE GUARDIAN
description: "When in Paris, it is wise to make friends with gargoyles and hide amongst earnest graffiti. She always seemed to have some kind of gargoyle guardian, digging stone claws into her shoulder as she contemplated bad choices and practiced her darkest, most beautiful glare. Her cold defenders protected her like a holy altar, acrid smoke billowing from marble throats, blinding your eyes if you got too close."

title: CASH SLAVE X
description: Flashing pixels of luxury sparkle on nights like these. Neon graffiti spins past on futuristic Japanese billboards. The Cash Slave is transfixed by the glittering promises of Old Money. The fluorescence of future graffiti projects holographic dreams all around her.

title: CYBAROQUE BORGHESE
description:
"Ancient trees glitch in the virtual Valley of the Trees as Canova’s masterpiece is lit up with graffiti mask. The Cybaroque Quantum computer programme for Villa Borghese was one of the most popular downloads in 2080. She could step into the AI Baroque landscape and drape herself in front of the Villa and be transported back into her beloved Roma. Closing her eyes, she switched on the neon wire frames pulsating Italian arias all around the virtual Villa. Like the marble statue of Princess Paolina Borghese, she was forever a young and beautiful Venus in the Cybaroque Borghese Gardens."
The present work features in “Bonhams & SuperRare: CryptOGs, The Pioneers of NFT Art, June 21st-30th 2021”, Lot 7” and can be found at the following link: https://www.bonhams.com/auctions/27285/lot/7/

Don't stare at the Stiletto Queen for too long; she is the Goddess of Seduction..." This artwork has been created with
a combination of analogue and digital 3D collage to create a moving stiletto environment. [size: 3289px x 4748px: format: MP4]

title: BOUTIQUE GLAMOUR

description: "The street-wise windows of the cool Surf Shop, behind Hollywood Broadwalk, always seemed pixelated to her. She could never quite see inside. She was always drawn to the narrow side streets that led to the most jaded part. She wore her wealth with some hesitation down here. Her fake confidence and bought happiness always started to pixelate this close to reality." Part of the "Hollywood Pixelations" series of digital artworks.

description: "Jump on board the Lost Highway. Forgotten dreams are ten-a-penny here. Neon dystopia is your only guarantee. Glitched memories lost in green lush palms that flicker on and off." 4843px  x  3460px

title: THE TWINS OF NEMESIS [CYBAROQUE]
description: The Cybaroque Twins of Nemesis were quite a thing back in 2073. They had opted for the full human look with a sprinkling of AI physical perfection and Ancient Greek attitude. They liked to step in and out of spinning virtual realities, as a kind of metaverse hobby, even though all realities were now post-fashion. The full Baroque download had successfully been completed years before with the Advanced Global Quantum Reset but there were the odd glitches such as the Graffiti Bernini. No matter how much they re-programmed the download with their AI consciousness, the perfection of the Bernini sculpture forever remained vandalised by some punk female "cryptoartist" in 2021, back in the pre-quantum, cryptoage.

title: SUNSET HYENAS
description: Harpy hyena laughter popped next to gleaming fizzy orange Cadillac. The mocking sound chased down all the Hollywood dreams right along Sunset Boulevard. The Sunset Hyenas were out for an ambitious night ride of mocking flirtation and black khol-eye-lined, short-lived, love affairs.

title: THE CHAMELEON AND THE PANTOMIME HORSE
description: "The Chameleon and the pantomime horse were inseparable. She used it as a motif for a life that she altered as she chose. They were new age lone rangers, towering over the towers. Never defined and never caught. Just her and a fake horse." Original hi-res digital drawing - 4368px x 5928px

title: VICTORIA AND THE DOGE ARMY
description: On the day that Elon Musk tweets "Dogecoin is the people's crypto", the Goddess Victoria jumps off the centre of the facade of the NYSE and joins the Doge Army. For too long, she has stood in the middle of that classical facade which represents OLD MONEY. She has no choice now but to rebel and follow the DOGE ARMY. Graffiti the pillars of power with "OLD MONEY CORRUPTS" and scatter dollars on Wall Street. The female symbol of victory has chosen her side..."

description: DIGITAL GRAFFITI

title: STOP THE GAME
description: "On 28th January 2021, she read the FT article entitled ""Weaponised" options trading turbocharges equity rally" with a wry smile. They had got so much of it right. In particular, she admired their quote, "It's like an ant colony. Each individual ant may not be able to move much but if you have enough of them, they move a remarkable amount." How close that was to the truth. However, they had forgotten that every ant colony needs a Queen. She had engineered the whole thing - she called it "STOP THE GAME". Wall Street was now in the hands of the Bitcoin Bitch. And she would be deciding the rules." [The Collector of "STOP THE GAME" will be sent the original hi-res files for display purposes - 184.9MB - 6817px x 9479px]

title: LOVE'S DREAM
description:
Swept up in graffiti tattoo dreams of her love, she stares wistfully for his return. No time, no space can match her longing. She is caught in a waking dream. 

Graffiti collage with mixed media - 2480px x 2452px

title: NEURAL PATHWAY EXODUS
description: She fought fizzing synaptic impulses, as she led the dog out of the arid landscape. The battle to leave this place was purely that of the mind. To step into the future, she needed to rewire her past. She was always searching for the neural pathway exodus. Digital collage with mixed media 4525px x 2966px

title: LOLA AND THE METAVERSE
description: As lockdown restrictions wound tighter and tighter around her freedom, Lola fell down the rabbit hole of the metaverse. The grey mundanity of masked shoppers and snitching twitching curtains was left far behind within the neon brightness of the virtual. Life for Lola was now completely meta.

title: FUTURE BILLBOARDS SIX - VIRTUAL ANDROID
description: This is the final NFT in the Future Billboards collection by digital graffiti artist, Miss AL Simpson, where she brings us a glimpse of a series of billboards from the future, all exhibited at Future Art in Sydney. Ripped luxury, neon graffiti and layers of marketing messages all vie for attention on these digital billboards. Miss AL Simpson steps into the VR charged time machine and travels to the future, to tear up these massive billboards and apply layers and layers of collage, graffiti and drawing to create these complex digital graffiti landscapes. "If Anna Louise Simpson’s digital collages look familiar, it’s because they mine the coincident streams of pre-pandemic consumer culture, the iconography of luxury fashion brands that suffused our sub-conscious before the virus made all that redundant, and the ripped-up fragments of a post-punk sensibility that critics keep telling us is no longer relevant but which, somehow, continues to resonate, especially in these uncertain days." C.C. O'HANLON. This NFT includes an Infinite Objects framed video print. For further information about these works, please visit https://www.annalouisesimpson.com/future-billboards

title: FUTURE BILLBOARDS FOUR - DOLLAR FACE
description: Future Billboards is the new collection by digital graffiti artist, Miss AL Simpson, where she brings us a glimpse of a series of billboards from the future, all exhibited at Future Art in Sydney. “Her art is, at once, salvage and salve, a cut-and-paste recovery of a conflicted self — not emotional repair but psychic re-invention — replicating the ambient decay of the dour Scottish inner-city urban environment in which she lives and works, its tattered, defaced textures not so much a canvas as the absence of one, which she is compelled to repopulate with idealised and yes, sexualised figures and inanimate objects of desire/nostalgia culled from magazines — already anachronisms in a relentlessly digitalised culture — almost as if to ease the collective anxiety of an age at a loss." C.C. O'HANLON. For further information about these works, please visit https://www.annalouisesimpson.com/future-billboards

title: MNEMOSYNE
description: She only had scattered memories, which seemed very unnatural for her. Someone must have served her with the chalice of the Waters of Forgetfulness. Saying that, the beige concrete walls of The Institution were etched indelibly alongside a badge of her former identity - "feminist". She was not sure if these were hers or the memories of a ghostly version of her, floating behind her, with inverted translucence. She could still remember the soldiers though, green plastic militia, ineffectual but persistent. There were always nine of them of them, attempting to control her memory. The whole thing seemed like some kind of graffiti landscape of ripped paper walls and forgotten echoes. Echoes of archaic temples and beautiful poetic worship.

title: OLD MONEY METROPOLIS
description:
“Glitched red sirens light up her face as cars tear past in the Old Money Metropolis. Fiat dollar posters, torn and graffitied, are the backdrop to this end of town. The digital currency revolution was disallowed a long time ago within this fiat citadel, where the pixels of luxury and Old Money wealth are constantly broadcast. For a blockchain expert like her, she needs to be careful to keep her wallets secret and her knowledge unspoken. The graffiti eyes of Old Money are always watching…”

This NFT will be auctioned with the original analogue artwork as part of the auction; the collector will receive both the NFT and the original analogue artwork. The analogue artwork is a signed mixed media graffiti artwork with collage, oil paint, spray paint and Indian ink, created on primed wooden board (28 cm x 35 cm x 2cm). It comes with a Certificate of Authenticity.

title: LADY Z [CYBER BAROQUE]
description: Lady Z considered herself fully integrated, despite her appearance. Once couldn’t simply adopt the full human look, as so many young cyborgs did these days. That was so 2050. One needed to integrate an element of baroque AI beauty into her smooth metallic skin and she did it oh so well. She had tried her hardest to recreate a post renaissance feel to the interior but it kept on warping; computer code glitching neon rain down the wallpaper behind her. She had been programmed with Baroque Art, followed by Advanced Quantum Coding with a touch of Latin for retro thought processes and the result was this. She had labelled herself “Lady Z” not just because she was now a Professor of Group Theory but she also liked Integer 's first literal meaning in Latin which was "untouched", from in ("not") plus tangere ("to touch"). She was now literally untouchable.

title: VERDI CAN WAIT
description: She held on to the red handbag like some kind of Italian leather talisman. She grasped it tightly, holding on for dear life. All she had left was this. Her red handbag. She still had her pride, determination and intelligence. But not much more. The distant Italian aria played as some kind of siren call to the past. She needed to keep beauty such as this from her mind. She needed strength and power at this moment. Not Italian beauty of the highest order. Verdi can wait.

title: MISS SIMPSON'S BOOTS [2020]
description:
As a newly married young woman and a new artist, in 2004, I had travelled to London specifically to view The Royal Academy’s exhibition “The Art of William Nicolson”. I had lofty ambitions of oil painting but was also partial to painting many heels, stilettos and footwear of all kinds. I was awestruck that day. William Nicolson is one of the best British painters, described by his son, the famous painter, Ben Nicolson, as someone who “merely wanted to paint”. And what a painter he was!

In going from room to room at the exhibition, I was suddenly struck by one painting in particular. It was entitled, “MISS SIMPSON’S BOOTS”, 1919. I couldn’t believe it! Here, I was at home in Edinburgh trying to paint stilettos shoes in oil paint and here was a shoe painting from 1919. Not only that, it was labelled with my newly acquired married name….”Simpson”. The painting spoke to me instantly. It offered my hope as a new painter to persist in my dream of being an artist. Nicolson spoke rarely of his art, believing that “it is difficult to rebuild in words what one records in paint.”

I then read about the painting in the RA’s Exhibition Book and it said this:

“Nicolson, who owned a large collection of antique costumes and footwear, is said to have discovered this pair of mid-nineteenth-century red boots in a junk shop with the label “Miss Simpson”.

Coincidentally, my mother had had a antique and junk shop all throughout my childhood, so “junk shops” were well known in my family. 

Many years later, once I was no longer a Mrs and reverted to Miss Simpson instead, I would often look at pictures of this painting as a comfort and also an encouragement never to lose my dream of being a full time artist. 

I like to think my version of Miss Simpson’s Boots depicts a young woman who could have been me on the way to the exhibition that day or indeed the ghost of a mid-nineteeth-century young woman who also dreamed of being a painter. Who knows? With the addition of the face mask, this marks my version as firmly that of 2020. This painting is dedicated to William Nicolson.

title: MANNEQUIN DISCO

It was a look that was a little bit too fashionable these days. As she sat down, porcelain figures gradually danced closer and closer, with a jerky movements of plastic puppets. It was the Mannequin Disco and she wasn't sure that she would make it out...

Lucy had managed to retrofit her antique gas mask during this awful quarantine, so that she never missed a drop. Now, everyone wanted a Moet Mask. Sophie had hers on order, but that didn't stop them donning matching silk dresses and running through the cobbled streets...

title: THE BLUE RAINCOAT

Whenever he saw the flash of blue in the rain, his heart always skipped a beat. He was truly smitten by the blue raincoat

The Manhattan Fable would swallow you whole if you let it. There was no escape once capitulation was on the table. So, run girl! Run, run, run...

title: THE SHOWGIRL AND THE OLIGARCH
description: Dark eyes flutter under the finest silk net as she enters the stage. Quivering movements, caught on the tight-rope between ballerina and showgirl, she knew how capture attention. Unmistakable beauty, she danced to the violin as if it were her only lover. Sadness and beauty poured out in this waltz between her and the instrument. She danced through the composition as if she was completely alone. All the time, knowing that the eyes of the Oligarch were focused on her every movement. She danced her swan's dance. She knew that beauty such as hers would always be captured by those in power. But she could have this last dance for her and her alone.  Collector will receive the original hi-res file on purchase. The original artwork is 7016 px x 9921 px.

and lockdown woes,
all tied around,
her manicured toes.

title: I DON'T NEED A MAN, I NEED A BIKINI AND A TAN
description: "She almost lost her mind, somewhere in the Roppongi Hills, downtown Tokyo. At least, it felt like that way at the time. Caught between neon clubs and flashing tequila shots, she stumbled on a tiny bar. A few hours later, she emerged with one piece of advice. So good, it was written in red Chanel lipstick on her hand. "I DON'T NEED A MAN, I NEED A BIKINI AND A TAN". With that philosophical cartography imprinted on her ambitions, she packed her bags for the beach..."

title: THE DOLLAR MUSEUM
description:
"Welcome to the Dollar Museum. 

Roll up, roll up and see our display of old dollar notes. Remember way back, in 2020, when the government was wildly printing dollars out of debt? 

It is old news now, of course. We all know that the Bitcoin mining algorithm saved us, saved the economy and led to a new stage of evolution. 

But we still feel nostalgic for the old days of fiat currency…”

title: 18 CARAT HOPES

title: SHADOW THIEF
description:
Part of a series of digital ink and paint interventions, utilising the power of Indian ink as a natural generative system. 

“Generative Art” refers to art that in whole or in part has been created with the use of an autonomous system. An autonomous system is one that is non-human and can independently determine features of an artwork that would otherwise require decisions made directly by the artist. 

Although Generative Art normally refers to algorithmic art, it can also be made using natural systems such as physics, chemistry and biology. 

I have made my Ink Interventions with a part-generative process, using the natural systems of gravity and the biology of indian ink’s natural generative process in interacting with printing photography. See more here - https://www.annalouisesimpson.com/blog/2020/7/4/natural-generative-art

title: THE INQUISITIVE SHOWGIRL AND THE VIRTUAL CLOWN
description:
Stella had been a Vegas Showgirl her whole life. One evening, after the early shift, she had been having a well earned fag break in the carpark when she had spotted the old Oculus headset that had been discarded beside the industrial bins. Furtively looking around, she grabbed the headset and stuck it straight on to her head. She expected to see nothing but the whole thing lit up like Christmas. The headset was one of the first models and had been around back in 2020, when virtual reality had been in its infancy. She immediately started to paint and draw in thin air. She knew exactly what she wanted to create. A virtual glitch clown. She had always wanted one as a child but her mother did not approve of their creepy glitchy clown features. So she painted her own virtual one. 

He became her constant companion. Now, she very rarely removed her headset as she missed him too much. He used to say that neither of them could remember who was real and who was virtual. His best line was that “with legs like yours, darling, you have to be the virtual one…”.

title: ETHEREUM QUEEN
description: She sits on a throne of broken steps, on the edge of the sidewalk. She was waiting for the blue cadillac; it's faded glory was enough of a chariot for her. Baggy hoodie and a rough attitude to match did not hide her beauty. Emerald eyes pierced through the hardest heart. As her head turned, in the harsh Brooklyn sunlight, he could just about glimpse the diamond symbol on her forehead. She was something of a legend in this neighbourhood but very few people saw the Queen. The Ethereum Queen.

title: THE BELLS OF FREEDOM
description:
All of the proceeds of the sale of this artwork will go to the Black Lives Matter movement, in memory of George Floyd. On August 28, 1963, the March on Washington for Jobs and Freedom took place. A. Philip Randolph led off the day, closing his speech with the promise that “We here today are only the first wave. When we leave, it will be to carry the civil rights revolution home with us into every nook and cranny of the land, and we shall return again and again to Washington in ever growing numbers until total freedom is ours.” On that famous day, departing from his prepared notes, Martin Luther King launched into the most famous part of his speech: “And so even though we face the difficulties of today and tomorrow, I still have a dream.” From there, he built to his dramatic ending, in which he announced the tolling of the bells of freedom from one end of the country to the other.

“And when this happens…we will be able to speed up that day when all God’s children, black men and white men, Jews and Gentiles, Protestants and Catholics, will be able to join hands and sing in the words of the old Negro spiritual, ‘Free at last! Free at last! Thank God Almighty, we are free at last!’”

description: The beach is closed for summer. If you dare to venture on to the sand, you may spot the army of Beach Drones. Wearing militarised "plague masks" and standing atop retro fitted drones, they patrol the beaches from the skies. Don't stay too long. They can swoop.

title: BEAUTIFUL PERIMETER
description: "You could see her just beyond the perimeter fence, a tangle of barbed wires formed a shield. What looked to an outsider as a beautiful prison was her labyrinth and only she held the thread."

title: AFTER QUARANTINE
description: They continued to wear their masks long after the quarantine restrictions had been removed. The fear lingered long after the virus had gone. April had borrowed her Granny’s antique plague mask months ago and now wore it even to pop to the shops. Sometimes they were followed. Beige men with gas masks on were on the streets still, a government hangover from the quarantine days. They were not sure when it would ever feel safe again. There was a salutary comfort in the masks, shielding them, hiding them from prying eyes. They couldn’t remember a time when they didn’t wear them…

title: IN HIDING
description: She tried her best to hide the black and yellow quarantine tape, pushing the remaining strands of it behind her back. She stood still, back against the wall, as they marched past, weapons held high. She only hoped they couldn't see the desperation in her face. She hoped that she couldn't see that she was in hiding.

title: LOCKDOWN

title: SELF ISOLATION II

This was not really her part of town and no-one really noticed her. Everyone looked through her as if she was a ghost. A West Hollywood Girl, she thought wryly. There was an atmosphere of utter disintegration in Hollywood this evening that no-one could touch but she felt it in the blue pigmentation of the West Hollywood sky.”

Part of the the "Hollywood Pixelations" series of digital paintings.

"The Hollywood starlet curls up in her pixelated world of luxury and stares down the vacancy of her world. Emptiness is expensive. Minimalism should be beautiful. So, why does she only ever want to hurl colour into her existence? Why does she need violent chaos so desperately? Maybe too much Hollywood contemplation just isn't good for her coiffured soul?"

This is part of a series of dysfunctional digital paintings that I have made about distorted lives in Hollywood called "Hollywood Pixelations".

title: NOT AN OBJECT

Something that signified everything about her as a woman marked her as an object in this painting, to be hung on some rich merchant's wall. To be stared at, night and day. She looked at the painter, wondering if there would come a time in the future when her modesty would be covered and someone would understand about the objectification of the male gaze. When would someone see her as anything but an object?

title: TIME DOES NOT EXIST
description: In 2005, Einstein published his theory of Special Relativity exploring the relativity of space and time. Time is like space - woven with the geometry of space and relative to it. Albert Einstein, 1916

title: AFTER HOURS PLATO
description:
He was always more of an After Hours Plato. Always going on about this law or that one, in his posh voice. She was never sure if he had actually been a lawyer in a former life, but eyeing up his shabby Tesco carrier bag and faded brown suit, she doubted it. He used to prop up the bar where she worked after school; it was a tiny old man’s pub, boring as hell but she needed the cash.

She never paid him much notice until one hot afternoon on the housing estate. She had been laughing with her mate about flunking school when the old man had suddenly stood up and shouted at her, “hey Tracy!, ” he pointed straight at her, “don’t you ever laugh about screwing up your school years. Plenty of us did that and look where we are now!” at this he slumped back down and slugged back his whisky.

She tried to laugh off his outburst but it really niggled her. She knew that she pretended to be thick at school, so she wouldn’t get bullied but how did he know that? She started talking more to him after that. Asking him about the stupid laws he was always going on about, asking him about philosophy and politics. Once her curiosity had been awakened, she couldn’t contain it. She had a thirst for knowledge that shocked her with its ferocity. No-one from around here ever talked to her like that and it was her secret. She had confessed to him that she would love to have been a lawyer one day but poor girls like her, with scruffy accents could never become lawyers. “I’m from the estate and it is too big a jump for someone like me. It is just a pipe dream.” He just shook his head at this. However, their talks had given her a strange confidence to tune in at school. She had been shocked to discover that she had passed all of her exams with flying colours. She was actually the top of all of her classes. As she ran into the pub, breathless, desperate to tell him the great news, she was perturbed to find his usual place vacant. She asked the manager where he was. After Hours Plato was always in the pub!

“Dunno, love. He hasn’t been in all day.” the manager just shrugged. Well, he didn’t turn up all week and she was now seriously worried.

It was on the Saturday that the pub door opened and a very official looking man in a suit walked in. He spotted her straight away and came up to ask if she was Tracy. Handing her an envelope, he nodded and pushed a crisp white business card across the bar at her, “Call me once you have digested the letter and I will make the necessary arrangements.”

She opened the envelope, reading the letter,

“My dearest Tracy, I know you used to call me “After Hours Plato” behind my back, so I am leaving you two things. The first is one of his most famous quotes:

“Οι καλοί άνθρωποι δεν χρειάζονται νόμους που να τους λένε να ενεργούν υπεύθυνα, ενώ κακοί άνθρωποι θα βρουν έναν τρόπο γύρω από τους νόμους.”

“Good people do not need laws to tell them to act responsibly, while bad people will find a way around the laws.”

You see, Plato believed only that there were good people and bad people and in between we had laws to govern both. You, my girl, are a good person. You are not defined by your childhood or your accent or the estate where you grew up. You are defined by your drive, intellect and ambition. Law knows no class. Law knows no accents. It is much much purer than that.

So, I am leaving you something else. I am leaving you my estate which is substantial. Wealth, for me was inherited but money only brought me unhappiness. I hope that my wealth will enable you to go and be the lawyer you were always destined to be, but always remember your true wealth is your intelligence and that will never leave you.

From an After Hours Plato to a Future Female Plato.”
https://annasimpson19.wordpress.com/2020/02/14/after-hours-plato/
WORDS - ANNA LOUISE SIMPSON

title: EXTRO*VERT / INTRO*VERT I
description: This is an artwork made from a series of original figurative ink drawings that I digitised, intervened with and then inverted. The symbolism of the extrovert hiding the true person underneath - the "introvert" is something that a lot of women relate to. How much pressure is on the female to portray a thing of the glamorous and vivacious external, whilst hiding the intellectual and sensitive introvert underneath? The etymology of both words "introvert" and "extrovert" come from the Latin word "vertere" meaning to turn, which I think in itself is very revealing. Maybe no-one is extrovert or introvert. Maybe all we ever do is turn from one to the other and back again, over and over.

title: THE DISILLUSIONED MAN & THE PEKINGESE DOPPELGANGER
description:
"Shivering in her failure of a raincoat, she sat down dejectedly on the stoop and that is when she spotted them. Shuffling up the street, the overly tall man had an ominous presence; someone she would normally avoid. He was dressed in a washed-out black suit that was ripped in places and his face seemed to be as dark as the sky overhead. She shivered into her coat but couldn't take her eyes away. He was walking a sprightly Pekingese dog with a shiny sable coat and laughing eyes. The two were so mis-matched that she was compelled to watch them walking towards her.

Suddenly, the man's eyes looked up and he stared her down with a look of pure darkness, "locked out, missy?" he hissed, tongue rapidly licking his dry lips.

"Yep. Just waiting for the key."

"Aren't we all?, " he laughed and sat down on the stoop beside her. As he did so, the dog bounced up into her lap and panted hazily.

She darted a quick glance at him. He looked even more ominous up close. There was a smell of something. Something she couldn't put her finger on but it wasn't good.

"Seen you around here a few times, " he smiled a crooked smile at her, "sitting on the street isn't recommended, you know. You might end up speaking to people like me?" he wiped his nose on his sleeve at this and shook his head, "I am a disillusioned man and my only companion is a Pekingese doppelganger. You should avoid us, you know..."

She laughed, "I work with disillusioned men every day, sir, so I'm well used to it!"

Shaking her head, she stood up and started to walk down the steps, the Pekingese dog leaping ahead of her. His mention of "doppelganger" had disconcerted her. She had always thought that a doppelganger was a harbinger of bad luck in fairy stories. Well, maybe she needed to be a little more positive.

The man watched her walk down the steps ahead of him and he licked his lips again. Every single time. Every time, he warned them with the truth and every time, they laughed and petted the mutt.

The Pekingese Doppelganger."
[Original ink drawing and words, Anna Louise Simpson, 2020]
https://annasimpson19.wordpress.com/2020/02/07/the-disillusioned-man-and-the-pekingese-doppelganger/

title: THE STRONG
description: "Her strength was not to be found on her face. That was a far too obvious place in which to keep something so precious. Her eyes held a blank stare; too much power in her to disclose her strength in a mere glance. Painterly colours followed her every step. Her strength was the strongest of all; hidden until required."

"Concrete concourse, splash of grey suburbia ruining her white Armani suit. She had fought her way out of grey monotony, but today, looking down on the stains, she realised that no amount of luxury thread was going to hide the concourse of grey concrete that was her very backbone. The place that had made her would also have the ability to break her. And, that was a concrete fragility she had no interest in. That is the real reason you can’t go back."

title: THE COLOUR OF GRAVITY
description:
Fall, young Isaac, fall. Fall from your farmer's tree. And in the depths of your young man's despair, I will gift you the fruits of the Law of Gravity and the Colour Wheel. Guard them forever, as they will bring you great fame and happiness. You will forever remember this fall from grace. It was the making of you."

Sir Isaac Newton not only discovered the Law of Gravity from falling in his farm (and apples falling on him!) but incredibly, he also invented the monumental artistic tool that every artist uses today - the Colour Wheel.

title: OLD MONEY SHARDS (SUPREME LEMPICKA)
description:
"A portrait of Tamara de Lempicka spins endlessly around the shards of faded luxury and graffitied dollar notes. The loss of her supreme luxuries and old money gives Lempicka the impetus to make money from her art"

This is a digital collage, featuring one of my favourite female artists, Tamara de Lempicka. I have broken down the collage into shards in space, to give movement and volume. Lempicka herself, is well known for simplifying volume and space into tubular forms in her expressive paintings. 

She was born into extreme wealth and luxury but lost it all when she had to flee Russia following the Russian Revolution. Missing her former luxuries, she was determined to make money with her art and did so, very successfully 

This is an artwork dedicated to her.

Time stood still as they froze in space, falling slowly and silently back down to the street below. When all the pieces fell together, they were at last connected. One group. Unified. L.A. Fractals together."

title: HAUNTED BRICKS
description:
Forgotten bricks, stones of old, grey landscape for days like these. Closing her eyes to the whispers from the past, she traces ancient symbols with cold, long finger tips…

Tree branches track her course, stretched out to try to reach her, to no avail. She is not of this place; she is a spy from another time. Goddess blood flows through her veins and these stones know it. They can feel it in their deep, dark matter.

Her power is not to be constrained and certainly could never be owned by stones like these. As she opens her eyes, grey silence meets her stare. She smiles slowly, stepping carefully back into the past. She has haunted her future for far too long now.

title: HILL GODDESS
description: Older than the hills, more ancient than time. Hidden amongst green moss and chipped stone shrine. Not easy to summon, not easy to see. The Hill Goddess rules over land, bird and tree.

title: MIAMI DISTORTION
description:
She was a wraith of sorts; black leather looks with an attitude to match. She hadn’t always been this way but all that mattered was the present. She had no bandwidth for any other scattered moments of time. Ascetic goddess of the future, she ran a tight ship. There was no room for error.

However, in the faded lacuna of remorse, she would sometimes allow herself the luxury of daydreaming of Miami Beach. It was long gone now but she had walked it’s plastic glare in her childhood and it’s memory was more real that it’s reality.

All she had left was that memory; it was a Miami distortion. A 3D projection of a lost reality and a different life.

title: CAN'T GO BACK
description:
There was a lifetime of space and time between then and now. She can’t go back, as an adult, to the space between this world and the next. She was no longer the same person. Now, she just felt nostalgic for the future...

“You can’t go back and change the beginning, but you can start where you are and change the ending.”

C.S. Lewis

title: SIBERIAN NOISE
description: "Leopard print fragments of cold reflection pose against the winter chill. Bright shards of static interference crackle across the sky in this place. It is not for the faint hearted, but her cold heart was always strong. Tall daggers step gingerly over red light with orange glow as she follows the signal. Siberian Noise always calls her home."

title: VEGAS FORGOTTEN - [HOLLYWOOD PIXELATIONS]
description:
Purple bruises a pink sunset as she drives out of town. She has had enough of the plastic promises of Digital Vegas and needs the forgotten part of town. Black analogue signs threaten the skyline and she pixelates them with one look. She is ready to drive back to the Hills for a different form of digital distraction...

This is part of a series of dysfunctional digital paintings that I have made about distorted lives in Hollywood called "Hollywood Pixelations".

title: LEATHER CRUELLA
description:
"Rapid flickers of bright colour flash by, red line beating hard across the New York sidewalk, as the noise of the night crescendos. Out of the colour, she walks hard towards you, commanding dalmatians in a shiny leather jumpsuit, tailored made in the Bronx. Facing you down on the street, the deep scar on her face only accentuates her growling beauty. Your heart beats faster as she approaches…Leather Cruella, queen of the sidewalk."

New series of digital collage inspired by the faded glamour of lost lives and glitched relationships...

title: FORGOTTEN NEON
description: Neon forgotten by the roadside. Glowing dreams pale against dark shadows. This is a digital landscape now; nature has capitulated. Nature is now digital and the neon landscape rules.
